entity.name: AbstractApplicationTrackingHistoryItem
entity.description: The base class of all the types of application tracking history items. With application tracking history itens we can know : when the candidate has applied on a requisition, when and what has changed in his personnal informations, when and what has change on his application, when and what was the progression of the candidate during the hiring process.

relation.name: Candidate
relation.description: The candidate to which the application tracking histoty item is related to.

relation.name: ProfileInformation
relation.description: The profile information on which the tracking history item applies to.

entity.name: AbstractOffer
entity.description: The ArtAbstractOffer entity is an abstraction of the possible types of offers. The ones related to the candidate are ArtCompetitiveOffer, ArtCurrentJob, ArtExpectation and ArtOffer. You can have an offer related to the Requisition which is the ArtRequesitionOfferParameter.

field.name: AnnualBonus
field.description: A multilingual string specifying the annual bonus.

field.name: CaptureDate
field.description: The captureDate represents the creation date of the offer.

field.name: CarAllowance
field.description: Multilingual string specifying the car allowance.

field.name: CommissionAmount
field.description: Multilingual string specifying the commission amount.

field.name: DaysPerWeek
field.description: Specifies the number of working days per week.

field.name: ExpenseAccount
field.description: Multilingual string specifying the expense account.

field.name: HoursPerDay
field.description: The hoursPerDay represents the number of hours per day the candidate will work.

field.name: Name
field.description: System generated. Every offer is given a unique sequential name.

field.name: Notes
field.description: Entry allowing the user who creates the offer to provide some information.

field.name: OtherBonus
field.description: Multilingual string specifying other bonus values.

field.name: OtherCompensation
field.description: Multilingual string specifying other compensation.

field.name: PayValue
field.description: Value resulting from the calculation of the salary divided by the pay period.

field.name: RelocationAmount
field.description: Specifies the amount allocated if relocation is required.

field.name: Salary
field.description: The salary represents the employee's wage.

field.name: SignOnBonus
field.description: The signOnBonus represents the amount offered to the candidate when signing the offer.

field.name: StockAmount
field.description: Multilingual string specifying the stock amount.

field.name: StockOption
field.description: Multilingual string specifying the stock option.

field.name: TargetStartDate
field.description: The targetStartDate specifies the date the candidate is scheduled to start working.

field.name: Vacation
field.description: Vacation is an integer value. In the UI, this is combined with the vacation type to express the desired value.

relation.name: CommissionType
relation.description: Link to the commissionType which is a user-defined selection. The commissionType and the commissionAmount together represent the desired commission.

relation.name: Currency
relation.description: Links to currency. An offer can or cannot have an associated currency. It is editable lookup entity and represents, for example, the currency of the salary.

relation.name: OfferTitle
relation.description: Link to an offerTitle. This is a lookup entity expressing the different titles an offer can have.

relation.name: PayFrequencyBasis
relation.description: Link to the ArtPayFrequencyBasis. This is a lookup entity expressing the different possibilities of pay basis.

relation.name: RelocationType
relation.description: Link to a user-defined selection which represents the possible relocation types.

relation.name: StockOptionType
relation.description: Link to a user-defined selection which represents the possible stock option types.

relation.name: StockType
relation.description: Link to a user-defined selection which represents the possible stock types.

relation.name: VacationType
relation.description: Link to ArtVacationType which represents the following vacation types: WEEKS, DAYS or PERCENT.

entity.name: AddressBookHistory
entity.description: This class represents the history address where the candidate has lived.

field.name: AddressLine1
field.description: This field holds the address part 1 of the candidate.

field.name: AddressLine2
field.description: This field holds the address part 2 of the candidate.

field.name: City
field.description: This field hold the value for the candidate city, since the rslocation doesn't constains the city.

field.name: County
field.description: This field holds the county, if applicable where the candidate lives.

field.name: DisplaySequence
field.description: This field determines the order to display this address book history among the candidate's address history.

field.name: FromDate
field.description: This field holds the date from where the candidate lives.

field.name: PostalCode
field.description: This field holds the postal code of the candidate.

field.name: ToDate
field.description: This field holds the to date where the candidate lives.

relation.name: Location
relation.description: Contains the place of residence location for the address book. Since the field value can't contain the city, we have a city field available also to be more specific.

entity.name: AdminEntityStatus
entity.description: Administration entity status

field.name: Code
field.description: A unique, alphanumeric code uniquely identifying a given status.

entity.name: Agency
entity.description: The role of the agency is to input prospective candidates into the candidate selection process.

field.name: ContactName
field.description: This field is the contact name of the agency.

field.name: ContactPhoneNumber
field.description: This field is the contact phone number of the agency.

field.name: EmailAddress
field.description: This field is the email address of the agency.

relation.name: AgencyServiceAgencies
relation.description: This field represents the services offerred by the agency.

relation.name: Agents
relation.description: This field represents the agents associated to the agency.

relation.name: RecruitmentSource
relation.description: This field is the source representing this agency.

entity.name: AgencyService
entity.description: This entity represents a service that can be offered by an agency.

field.name: Code
field.description: Public identifier of the entity.

entity.name: AgencyServiceAgency
entity.description: This entity represents a service offered by an agency. At least one service is offered by an agency.

field.name: IsDefault
field.description: This field indicates if the agency is selected by default when requesting a service.

relation.name: Agency
relation.description: This field represents the agency offering the services.

relation.name: AgencyService
relation.description: This field is the service offered by an agency. Available services are: Sourcing Strategy, Internet Mining, Media Placement, and Staffing.

entity.name: Agent
entity.description: An agent is a user type (outside of the company) that has special limited access to an organization's recruiting application.

field.name: Address
field.description: This field is the address of the agent.

field.name: Address2
field.description: This field is the rest of the address of the agent.

field.name: City
field.description: This field is the city of the agent.

field.name: CorrespondenceLocale
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: CreationDate
field.description: This field is the date when the agent has been created.

field.name: EmailAddress
field.description: This field is the email address of the agent.

field.name: Fax
field.description: This field is the fax phone number of the agent.

field.name: FirstName
field.description: This field is the first name of the agent.

field.name: HomePhone
field.description: This field is the home phone number of the agent.

field.name: LastName
field.description: This field is the last name of the agent.

field.name: MobilePhone
field.description: This field is the mobile phone number of the agent.

field.name: Number
field.description: The unique internal id

field.name: PagerPhone
field.description: This field is the pager number of the agent.

field.name: WorkPhone
field.description: This field is the office phone number of the agent.

field.name: Zip
field.description: This field is the zip/postal code of the agent.

relation.name: Agency
relation.description: This field represents the agency of the agent.

relation.name: Credentials
relation.description: The credentials of the agent

relation.name: RecruitmentSource
relation.description: This field is the related source.

relation.name: TimeZone
relation.description: The time zone the agent is working in.

entity.name: Application
entity.description: Kind of application that represents an application of a candidate on a specific requisition. The application can be entered by the candidate, a recruiter, a referrer or an agent. As for the general application, the specific application contains information like: - The candidate's skills assessment and answers to the requisition questions - The candidate's resume (structured and/or not) - The candidate's score and ranking - The studies and experiences of the candidate - Potential comments This information may be different from the general application information.

field.name: BillRate
field.description: This field define the bill rate use for an application on a contingent requisition type. The bill rate proposed by the supplier.

field.name: ChargeSalesTax
field.description: This field define the sales tax use for an application on a contingent requisition type Determine if the sales tax must be charged to the customer.

field.name: CSWLatestDate
field.description: The date to which the latest move was perform in the selection workflow.

field.name: DateOfEntry
field.description: The date to which the candidate is supposed to start working.

field.name: DisqualifierResultDate
field.description: The application disqualifier result date (knockout status). The date when the application disqualifier result has been evaluated according to the candiidate answers to the disqualification questions. A corresponding disqualifier result is set.

field.name: EEOInfoRequestDate
field.description: The date to which the request eeo informations was sent to the candidate.

field.name: ExpirationDate
field.description: Date when the application becomes expired. Value is empty when the application is valid forever.

field.name: Grade
field.description: The grade of the candidate entered by an operator. The grade is independent of the score obtained by the candidate for the questions and the skills.

field.name: IsOnRestrictedStep
field.description: Internal use. Not exportable. Not importable. This field may become asynchronous with the DB. This happens when a step that was not restricted become restricted. The applications that were already on that step keep their old value until they move on the CSW and the value get recomputed.

field.name: IsSubmissionExpired
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: LastSubmissionDate
field.description: Date when the candidate applied/re-applied the last time on this requisition

field.name: LetterSendRegretLetter
field.description: The date to which the regret letter has been sent.

field.name: NewApplication
field.description: Indicate if the application is at the initial status of the workflow.

field.name: NumberOfDayBeforeSubmissionExpiration
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: OnboardingProcessDefinitionNumber
field.description: Internal use only. Not exportable. Not importable. This the key that has been use to start the onboarding process.

field.name: PayRate
field.description: This field define the pay rate use for an application on a contingent requisition type The rate the worker is paid

field.name: QueueRouteShortcutNumber
field.description: Not exportable and not importable. This field is used from the candidate list.

field.name: ReferenceDate
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: ReferenceEndDate
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: ReferralType
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: Referred
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: RmiCompletedDate
field.description: The date to which the candidate did came back in career section to complete his information.

field.name: RmiSentDate
field.description: The date to which the request more information email has been sent to the candidate.

field.name: SupplierOrderNumber
field.description: Define the requisition number that the candidate applied in the supplier system. This field is never display to the customer.

field.name: SupplierWorkerID
field.description: Define the worker id that the candidate receive in the supplier system. This field is never display to the customer.

relation.name: AceAlertStatus
relation.description: The status of the ace alert email, namely if it were sent or not to the operators.

relation.name: ApplicationRequisition
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: ApplicationState
relation.description: Indicate the state of the application. This field is calculated and updated only by the candidate selection workflow. It cannot be imported directly.

relation.name: ApplicationStatusesByContext
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: AttachedFiles
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: CandidateReferrer
relation.description: The referrer that referred the candidate on the requisition. When the candidate is referred by a referrer a cancellation task is created. The task is scheduled according to the ERTReferralValidityPeriod cie setting.

relation.name: CSWLatestStatus
relation.description: The application's last Candidate Selection Workflow status. The place where the candidat is in the recruiting process. This denormalized field is their for performance issue.

relation.name: CSWLatestStep
relation.description: The application's last Candidate Selection Workflow step. The place where the candidat is in the recruiting process for a given status. This denormalized field is their for performance issue.

relation.name: CSWTrace
relation.description: The application's Candidate Selection Workflow trace. The place where the candidat is in the recruiting process.

relation.name: CSWWorkflow
relation.description: The Candidate Selection Worklow that is used to process applications. This denormalized field is their for performance issue.

relation.name: CurrentOffer
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: DisqualifierResult
relation.description: The application disqualifier result (knockout status). The application disqualifier result is set at the moment the candidate assesses himself to disqualification questions.

relation.name: Expectations
relation.description: Link to the application related to this expectation offer.

relation.name: LocationsAppliedTo
relation.description: The list of locations that the candidate applied to.

relation.name: MatchedFromRequisition
relation.description: This relation define from which Requisition the candidates has been match to this one.

relation.name: Meeting
relation.description: A meeting that the candidate is scheduled to assist.

relation.name: Offers
relation.description: The list of offers that were presented to the candidate for that application.

relation.name: OwnerAgent
relation.description: The agent that referred the candidate on the requisiton. When the candidate is referred by an agent a cancellation task is created. The task is scheduled according to the ERTReferralValidityPeriod cie setting.

relation.name: PreselectionResults
relation.description: The results of the candidate for the application. The results contains informations like : if the candidate is an ace candidate, his score, the number of assets the candidate met, etc...

relation.name: ProfileInformation
relation.description: The overrided profile information that applies specifically for this application.

relation.name: ReferralStatus
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: Requests
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: Requisition
relation.description: The requisition on which this application is linked

relation.name: RmiStatus
relation.description: The status of the "Request More Information" letter.

relation.name: WorkerType
relation.description: This relation define the values type for the income tax use in the contingent world.

entity.name: ApplicationCertification
entity.description: Application certifications are the certifications that the candidate has entered in the context of the application.

field.name: DateReceived
field.description: This field holds the date received certification.

field.name: DisplaySequence
field.description: This field determines the order to display this application certification among the candidate's application certifications.

field.name: ExpirationDate
field.description: This field holds the expiration date of the certifications..

field.name: IssuingOrganization
field.description: This field holds the certification issuing organization.

field.name: No
field.description: this is the key field

field.name: NumberId
field.description: This field holds the certification ID enter by the candidate.

field.name: OtherCertificationName
field.description: This field hold the value for the other certification name if it is not part of the list.

relation.name: Application
relation.description: This relation define the application related to the certifications.

relation.name: Certification
relation.description: The certification

relation.name: Location
relation.description: This relation hold the location where the candidate received the certifications.

entity.name: ApplicationHistoryAnswerItem
entity.description: This class is not used anymore. It has been replaced by the class ApplicationTrackingAnswerChangeItem. We keep it only for backward compatibility. This class is used to track the changes that are made to a candidate's answers. The history items are created for both standard questions along with Employment Equity questions.

relation.name: CandidateAnswerUpdates
relation.description: Contains the list of old answers that were provided.

entity.name: ApplicationHistoryApplicationCertificationUpdateItem
entity.description: Application History Application Certification Update Item Entity.

entity.name: ApplicationHistoryBackgroundCheckUpdateItem
entity.description: Application History Background Check Update Item Entity.

entity.name: ApplicationHistoryDisqualificationItem
entity.description: This class is used to track candidate disqualifications

entity.name: ApplicationHistoryExperienceUpdateItem
entity.description: This class is used to track the changes that are made to a candidate's experience. The history items are created for both general application experience along with specifc application experience.

entity.name: ApplicationHistoryFieldUpdateItem
entity.description: This class is used to track the changes that are made to a candidate's informations.

entity.name: ApplicationHistoryPersonalInfoUpdateItem
entity.description: This class is used to track the changes that are made to a candidate's personal informations.

entity.name: ApplicationHistoryPropagatedAnswerItem
entity.description: This class is used to track the changes that are made to an answer of a question.

entity.name: ApplicationHistoryPropagatedSkillAnswerItem
entity.description: This class is used to track the changes that are made to skill details.

entity.name: ApplicationHistoryReferenceUpdateItem
entity.description: Used as a container for the reference entity tracking change.

entity.name: ApplicationHistoryResumeUpdateItem
entity.description: This class is used to track the changes that are made to candidate's resume. Any change to the pasted resume, cover letter, additional information, or career objectives will be tracked with that kind of item.

entity.name: ApplicationHistoryShiftAvailabilityUpdateItem
entity.description: This class is used to track the changes that are made to Shift Availability.

entity.name: ApplicationHistorySkillAnswerItem
entity.description: This class is used to track the changes that are made to a candidate's skill answer.

relation.name: CandidateSkillUpdates
relation.description: Contains the list of old skill answers that were provided.

entity.name: ApplicationHistoryStudyUpdateItem
entity.description: This class is used to track the changes that are made to a candidate's study. The history items are created for both general application study along with specifc application experience.

entity.name: ApplicationHistoryUpdateItem
entity.description: This is the base class of the application tracking history item that are created when a field is modified. Fields can be answers, experiences, personal informations, resume, skills or studies.

relation.name: CandidateUpdates
relation.description: Contains all the modifications that have been done on the different fields of the candidate. It is a kind of history of of values that were given overtime.

relation.name: FieldUpdateDetails
relation.description: Contains all the modifications that have been done on the answers of the EEO questions. It is a kind of history of of answers that were given overtime.

entity.name: ApplicationMedium
entity.description: This entity is a lookup containing the information on how did we learn about the candidate for a specific application.

field.name: Code
field.description: Public identifier of the application medium.

entity.name: ApplicationRequisition
entity.description: The number of assets/required for candidates criteria that the candidate meets for the requisition he applies to.

field.name: RequisitionTotalAssets
field.description: The number of required for all candidates criteria that the candidate meets for the requisition he applies to.

field.name: RequisitionTotalAssetsExt
field.description: The number of assets for external candidates criteria that the candidate meets for the requisition he applies to.

field.name: RequisitionTotalAssetsInternal
field.description: The number of assets for internal candidates criteria that the candidate meets for the requisition he applies to.

field.name: RequisitionTotalRequired
field.description: The number of assets for all candidates criteria that the candidate meets for the requisition he applies to.

field.name: RequisitionTotalRequiredExternal
field.description: The number of required for external candidates criteria that the candidate meets for the requisition he applies to.

field.name: RequisitionTotalRequiredInternal
field.description: The number of required for internal candidates criteria that the candidate meets for the requisition he applies to.

entity.name: ApplicationState
entity.description: This entity is a lookup containing the information about the status representing the progression of an application within a specific step.

field.name: CanBeThresholdToCollectEEOUSA
field.description: This field indicates whether the application status reach the threshold to collect the EEO/Affirmative information or not.

field.name: IndicatorToCollectEEOUSA
field.description: This field indicates if it's possible or not to collect the EEO/Affirmative Action information when an applicant has reached the status.

field.name: Terminal
field.description: This field indicates whether the state is a final state or not in the application flow.

field.name: WorkflowSequence
field.description: This field represents the position of the state among the others in the progression of an application.

entity.name: ApplicationStatusByContext
entity.description: Contains the configuration for statuses, e.g. contains the mappings between the requisition type, the CSUser type and any CSW workflow/step/status. For example, the status "TO BE PHONE SCREENED" of step "PHONE SCREEN" could display the label "Is in progress" for all types of CSUser, except for the internal candidate which could have more feedback about the process. Those statuses can also be configured according to the requisition type, so candidate applying on a campus requisition could have a feedback different from the candidate applying on a professional requisition.

relation.name: ApplicationStatusByContextDefinition
relation.description: The configuration entity contains a facing status. For example, a status can be configured specifically for some CSW Mapper (workflow/step/status), requisition type and CSUser type. Each combination will be held in his on configuration entity (row).

relation.name: ApplicationStatusByContextUserType
relation.description: This entity contains a CSUser facing type. For example, a specific configuration can be done internal candidates. In that case, the facing status will be displayed for internal candidates only.

entity.name: ApplicationStatusByContextDefinition
entity.description: Represents a status that will be displayed to the CSUser. A facing status CAN be configured for many combination of CSWMapper, hire (requisition) types and csuser types.

field.name: CustomizedName
field.description: To be documented.

entity.name: ApplicationText
entity.description: Contains all the text datas that a candidate can provide. It contains datas like the cover letter, pasted resume, career objectives and additional informations. removeCheckOnDelete=true)

field.name: AdditionalInformation
field.description: The additional information that the candidate provided.

field.name: CareerObjective
field.description: The career objectives that the candidate provided.

field.name: CoverLetter
field.description: The cover letter that the candidate provided.

field.name: PastedResume
field.description: The pated resume that the candidate provided.

relation.name: ProfileInformation
relation.description: The profile information for which those datas applies to.

entity.name: ApplicationTrackingAnswerChangeItem
entity.description: This class is used to track the changes that are made to a candidate's answers. The history items are created for both standard questions along with Employment Equity questions.

field.name: QuestionNumber
field.description: The question's unique identifier that has been modified.

entity.name: ApplicationTrackingAttachFileItem
entity.description: This kind of application tracking history item is used to track when an operator attach a file to the the application.

relation.name: AttachedFile
relation.description: To be documented.

entity.name: ApplicationTrackingChangeEventItem
entity.description: This kind of application tracking history is used to track the modification of an event date.

field.name: NewEventDate
field.description: The new event date that has been set by the operator who perfom the action.

field.name: OldEventDate
field.description: The old event date that has been set by the operator who perfomed the action.

relation.name: ModifiedItem
relation.description: The original tracking history item that his event date has been modified.

entity.name: ApplicationTrackingCSWItem
entity.description: This kind of application tracking history is created when the candidate progress in the flow of the recruiting process. Example are : change the status of the candidate, make an offer to the candidate, hire the candidate, etc. (removeCheckOnCreate=true,removeCheckOnRead=true, removeCheckOnUpdate=true, removeCheckOnDelete=true)

field.name: IsConditional
field.description: Indicate if the change status is conditional or not.

field.name: Reverted
field.description: Indicate if this step has been reverted

relation.name: ApplicationState
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: CSWMotives
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: ParentItem
relation.description: When an action creates two tracking items they are linked by this field. The first item to be created is the parent of the second one.

relation.name: Status
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: Step
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: Workflow
relation.description: To be documented.

entity.name: ApplicationTrackingExternalServiceItem
entity.description: Application tracking history items for external services.

relation.name: RequestStatus
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: Service
relation.description: To be documented.

entity.name: ApplicationTrackingHistoryItem
entity.description: The base class of all the types of application tracking history items. This class contains all the common information that can be stored to know what happened to the application of the candidate.

field.name: CommentText
field.description: Contains the comment entered by the operator who perform an action that created an application tracking history item.

field.name: CreationDate
field.description: The date on which the application tracking history item has been created.

field.name: Detail
field.description: Contains the detail informations about what happened to the candidate or his application.

field.name: EventDate
field.description: This is the date that the operator say that the event has occured or will occured.

field.name: ProfileLocale
field.description: To be documented.

relation.name: Event
relation.description: The event that fired the creation of the application tracking history item.

relation.name: Message
relation.description: If a message has been sent to the candidate, this attribute contains the message.

relation.name: Origin
relation.description: The application tracking item to which the current application tracking item is linked to.

relation.name: Substitute
relation.description: The operator that triggered the action.

relation.name: Tokens
relation.description: This attribute contains tokens to add detaills to the tracking history item.

relation.name: User
relation.description: The operator that performed an action that created the tracking history item.

entity.name: ApplicationTrackingItemToken
entity.description: This class is use to store a pair of informations (token ,value) to help build the column details that is displayed into the column details. Suppose that we have a detail string that look like that : "Hello {token_example} !!!" And suppose that we have a token "token_example" who is value is "World". When the replacement will be done, we will have this detail string : Hello World !!!

field.name: Token
field.description: The token is a string that we need to replace with it's value to build the detail string that will be displayed.

field.name: Value
field.description: The value is string that will replace the token string to build the detail string that will be displayed.

relation.name: Item
relation.description: The item to which the application tracking item token is related to.

entity.name: ApplicationTrackingOfferItem
entity.description: An application tracking history item used to track candidate offer changes. (removeCheckOnCreate=true,removeCheckOnRead=true, removeCheckOnUpdate=true, removeCheckOnDelete=true)

field.name: IsNewStartDateTentative
field.description: Indicates if the new start date is tentative or not.

field.name: IsOldOfferAccepted
field.description: Indicates if the old offer was accepted by the candidate or not.

field.name: IsOldStartDateTentative
field.description: Indicates if the old start date is tentative or not.

field.name: NewExpirationDate
field.description: The new date when the offer expires.

field.name: NewStartDate
field.description: The new date when the candidate is supposed to start working.

field.name: OfferAcceptedDate
field.description: The date when the offer was accepted by the candidate.

field.name: OfferExtendedDate
field.description: The new expiry date for an extended offer.

field.name: OldExpirationDate
field.description: The old expiry date for an extended offer.

field.name: OldStartDate
field.description: The old date when the candidate was supposed to start working.

relation.name: Offer
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: OfferMotives
relation.description: To be documented.

entity.name: ApplicationTrackingSharePrintItem
entity.description: This kind of application tracking history is created when the candidate is printed or shared. It contains some information about which candidate file content was selected, the recipients, the selected attachment, etc. (removeCheckOnCreate=true,removeCheckOnRead=true, removeCheckOnUpdate=true, removeCheckOnDelete=true)

relation.name: SharePrintItemAttachments
relation.description: The selected attachments to be included in the shared information.

relation.name: SharePrintItemContent
relation.description: The selected candidate file content to be included in the shared information.

relation.name: SharePrintItemRecipient
relation.description: The selected recipients to send the candidate file information.

entity.name: ApplicationTrackingSharePrintItemAttachment
entity.description: This class contains the attachments selected for an ApplicationTrackingSharePrintItem instance.

field.name: SharePrintItemAttachmentNo
field.description: The unique identifier.

entity.name: ApplicationTrackingSharePrintItemContent
entity.description: This class contains the candidate file content selected for an ApplicationTrackingSharePrintItem instance. We store tab type nos which correspond to candidate file available tabs (ex: General Profile, Job Submission, Attachments, Referral, History, etc.).

field.name: EsTabTypeNo
field.description: The tab type no of the corresponding TabType instance.

field.name: No
field.description: The unique identifier.

entity.name: ApplicationTrackingSharePrintItemRecipient
entity.description: This class contains the recipients selected for an ApplicationTrackingSharePrintItem instance.

field.name: EmailAddress
field.description: The email address of the recipient.

field.name: SharePrintItemRecipientNo
field.description: The unique identifier.

entity.name: Approval
entity.description: This is an approbation state. It keeps comment and decision for one user during one approbation process.

field.name: Sequence
field.description: To be documented.

entity.name: ApprovalContext
entity.description: [ApprovalContext] makes links between the approbation process (defined by the [ProcessDefinition]) and approbations states made during approbation process.

field.name: ApprovalRequestorComment
field.description: Approval requestor comment

relation.name: Approbations
relation.description: To be documented.

field.name: FileContent
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: HashCode
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: IsSearchable
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: MimeType
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: Size
field.description: To be documented.

relation.name: Application
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: AttachmentType
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: Candidate
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: Creator
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: InfoFeeder
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: Requisition
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: Status
relation.description: Reference to the Administration Entity status of the administration entity

entity.name: AttachmentType
entity.description: This entity represents the functionnal type of the attached file.

entity.name: Attendee
entity.description: The Attendee entity is an abstraction of the meeting expected participants. The meeting organizer is also considered as an attendee. The three possible types of attendee are CSUserAttendee, UserAttendee, and UnresgistredAttendee. The link between the Attendee and the Meeting is done by the MeetingAttendee who associates a MeetingAttendeeRole to an Attendee.

relation.name: MeetingAttendees
relation.description: There is always an associated Attendee for each MeetingAttendee.

entity.name: BackgroundCheckConsent
entity.description: This class represents the candidate the acceptance of the document agreement when he submit a profile or apply on a requisition.

field.name: Consent
field.description: This field hold the value to determine if the candidate accept or not to allow background checking.

field.name: InquiryReportRequested
field.description: This field indicates if the inquiry report is requested or not.

relation.name: BackgroundCheckConsentDocuments
relation.description: The documents of the background check.

relation.name: ProfileInformation
relation.description: This relation represents the background check consent associated to the application .

entity.name: BackgroundCheckGeneral
entity.description: This class holds the general information about the background check.

field.name: CityOfBirth
field.description: This field holds the city of birth of the candidate.

field.name: MotherMaidenName
field.description: This field holds the mother maiden name of the candidate.

entity.name: BaseAdminEntity
entity.description: Base class for all administrable entities.

field.name: Code
field.description: Unique identifier providing a meaningful key

field.name: Name
field.description: Name of the Administration Entity (mutlilingual)

relation.name: Status
relation.description: Reference to the Administration Entity status of the administration entity

entity.name: BaseComposite
entity.description: Generic entity to provide a tree structure data

field.name: Code
field.description: Unique identifier providing a meaningful key

field.name: Level
field.description: Indicates the level where the composite is located in the tree structure. The level of the root of the tree structure is 0. It's a read-only calculated field.

field.name: Name
field.description: Name of the composite (mutlilingual)

field.name: Number
field.description: Unique identifier generated by the system

relation.name: Children
relation.description: Reference to the children of a specific composite. This list of composite is read-only

relation.name: Parent
relation.description: Reference to the parent of a specific composite

relation.name: Sequence
relation.description: Sequence of the composite

relation.name: Status
relation.description: Reference to the Administration Entity Status of the composite

entity.name: BaseCompositeSequence
entity.description: Generic entity to provide a way to personalize sorting of the tree structure elements

field.name: Sequence
field.description: Specified sorting order, overriding the default sorting order

entity.name: BaseHierarchy
entity.description: BaseHierarchy is an abstract class providing an hierarchical tree structure.

field.name: Level
field.description: The level of the element in the hierarchical tree structure from the root. The root level in the tree structure is 0. The deeper the element is in the hierachy, the higher the level will be.

entity.name: BaseJobField
entity.description: Abstract class representing the common attributes and relations of a Job Field.

entity.name: BaseLocation
entity.description: Abstract class representing a geographical location.

field.name: Abbreviation
field.description: Abbreviation of the location

field.name: Latitude
field.description: Latitude of the location

field.name: Longitude
field.description: Longitue of the location

field.name: ZipCode
field.description: Zip code of the location

entity.name: BaseMultilingualAdminEntity
entity.description: This class serves as a common ancestor for all multilingual, administrable entities. It defines fields and methods that should be common across all those entities.

field.name: Active
field.description: Indicates if the given language is active (or usable). Inactive languages are seen only when administering an entity, and are not considered usable throughout the system.

field.name: Base
field.description: Indicates if the given language is the base language for this entity. The entity must have a base language, and that language must also be supported by the entity.

entity.name: BaseMultilingualEntity
entity.description: This class serves as a common ancestor for all multilingual entities. It defines fields and methods that should be common across all those entities.

field.name: Active
field.description: Indicates if the given language is active (or usable). Inactive languages are seen only when administering an entity, and are not considered usable throughout the system.

field.name: Base
field.description: Indicates if the given language is the base language for this entity. The entity must have a base language, and that language must also be supported by the entity.

entity.name: BaseRole
entity.description: The role represent the role of an actor; it can be a system role or a user defined role.

entity.name: Candidate
entity.description: Candidate is one of the most important aspect in the recruitment process. A candidate is an individual about whom a customer possesses relevant information, such as his/her Profile and Personal Info. This information may be acquired as follows: - Most often, the candidate provides it when he/she applies on a position using a requisition or through unsolicited manner. This can be done using an electronic application or through regular mail. - In some cases, the candidate may not have provided the some information. The candidate can be an individual that do not work for the company or it can be an internal employee.

field.name: ActiveApplicationCount
field.description: This field contains the number of applications that the candidate has. This field is incrementd when the candidate apply on a requisition and the cie setting DisplayIncompleteApplication is set to 1. If the later cie setting is set to 0, the count will be incremented only when the application become completed.

field.name: Address
field.description: The first part of the personal address of the candidate.

field.name: Address2
field.description: The second part of the personal address of the candidate.

field.name: Anonymous
field.description: Indicates if the candidate wants to remain anonymous. An anonymous candidate has not gave his firstname and lastname.

field.name: AvailabilityDate
field.description: The date at which the candidate will be able to start to work.

field.name: Birthday
field.description: The date on which the candidate is born.

field.name: CHiringProcessStatus
field.description: This field is read-only and it is for internal uses. This field indicate if the candidate has more than one active application (=2) or if the candidate has only one active application (=1). This field is never persisted.

field.name: City
field.description: The city of the personnal adress of the candidate.

field.name: CreationDate
field.description: The date when the candidate has been created.

field.name: CSWLatestDate
field.description: The date on which the candidate advance in the hiring process for the last time.

field.name: DisqualifierResultDate
field.description: The general profile disqualifier result date of the candidate (knockout status). The date when the candidate disqualifier result has been evaluated according to its answers to the general company disqualification questions. A corresponding disqualifier result is set.

field.name: EmailAddress
field.description: The email address of the candidate. This field is automatically trimmed and lower cased when updated.

field.name: EmployeeCreationDate
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: EmployeeNumber
field.description: The employee number of the candidate if this this one is an internal employee.

field.name: Fax
field.description: The personnal fax number of the candidate.

field.name: FirstName
field.description: The first name of the candidate.

field.name: HasReferrered
field.description: Indicate if the candidate has referred another candidate.

field.name: HomePhone
field.description: The personnal home phone of the candidate.

field.name: Hourly
field.description: This private field is used to optimized batch process on candidate. The concept of "Hourly candididate" does not exist in taleo system. This field is managed with the following algorithm: Yes: When he applied only on Hourly Requisition(s). No: From the moment a candidate applies on a professionnal or campus requisition, or when he submits his profile. This field is populated by trigger. Do not import this field.

field.name: IdentificationMissing
field.description: This field is read-only. It indicate if the candidate has NOT given his firstname and his lastname and he had not indicated that he whiches to be anonymous when he entered his personnal informations. This field is never persisted.

field.name: InclusiveLastModifiedDate
field.description: This field contains the last date that a modification has been made on the candidate. Ether on his personnal or his progression in the hiring process, or any other changes.

field.name: InHiringProcess
field.description: Indicate if the candidate is involved in at least one hiring process on a requisition. The field activeApplicationsCount must be loaded in order to have a valid value in this field.

field.name: InternalApplication
field.description: Indicate if the candidate is an internal employee or not. A candidate that apply on a internal career site is set to internal automatically. Thus, if a candidate is hired and the cie setting AutomaticallyIdentifyCandidateAsInternal is set to 1, a task (IdentifyCandidateAsInternalTask) will be created to set the field to true when the start date is reached.

field.name: IsApplicant
field.description: This field indicate if the candidate manifested his desired to be employed by the cie. He has applied on at least one requisition or he has submitted his profile. If the candidate is only a referrer, this field will be false.

field.name: IsPersonalInfoMasked
field.description: This field is for internal uses. It indicate if the personal informations have been masked by the Squeezer policy the perform a soft delete. Not importable.

field.name: LastActivityDate
field.description: This field is read-only. It contains the most recent date between the last modified date and the csw latest date.

field.name: LastApplicationDate
field.description: This field contains the date of the last application of the candidate. This column has been added to correct a performance issue in the squeezer engine.

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: The date on which the candidate as been modified for the last time.

field.name: LastName
field.description: The last name of the candidate.

field.name: MiddleInitial
field.description: The middle initial of the candidate.

field.name: MobilePhone
field.description: The personnal mobile phone of the candidate.

field.name: NotifyByEmail
field.description: Indicate if the candidte which to be notify by email when a new requisition that match his profile is posted on the career site.

field.name: Number
field.description: The unique identifier of this entity.

field.name: PagerPhone
field.description: The personnal pager phone of the candidate.

field.name: PersonalInfoValidated
field.description: Indicate if the personnal informations has been validated or not by the candidate.

field.name: Prefix
field.description: This field holds the value for the prefix name of the candidate. i.e Mr, Mrs, etc.

field.name: ReferenceDate
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: ReferenceEndDate
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: ReferralType
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: Referred
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: Salary
field.description: The salary the candidate whiches to have.

field.name: SocialSecurityNumber
field.description: The social security number of the candidate.

field.name: SubscribeURL
field.description: The value of SubscribeURL will always be empty when the export mode is set to XML-report or CSV-report. Use other export modes to retrieve the SubscribeURL value.

field.name: Suffix
field.description: This field holds the value for the suffix name of the candidate. i.e Eng, MD, etc.

field.name: WebSite
field.description: The url of the web site of the candidate.

field.name: WorkPhone
field.description: The phone of the candidate where he is working right now.

field.name: ZipCode
field.description: The zip code of the personnal address of the candidate. This field, when updated, will trigerred automatically the update of the geo conding informations.

field.name: Candidate QI Grade (for Sourcing team only)
RDP_Current or most recent Salary and Grade level
RDP_Highest government Salary and Grade level (in last five years)
RDP_If yes, please describe in detail
RDP_If yes, please describe the nature of the relationship(s) below
RDP_If yes, please describe the precise duties and relevance to HP
RDP_If yes, please describe the precise duties and time spent in the role(s) below
Test Administrator Last Name, First Name

relation.name: AddressBookHistory
relation.description: This relation shows the candidate address book history.

relation.name: AdvanceNotice
relation.description: The advance notice that the candidate must give to his current employer before starting to work for the company.

relation.name: Applications
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: AttachedFiles
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: BackgroundCheckGeneral
relation.description: This relation is the candidate information about background check general.

relation.name: CandidateReferrer
relation.description: The referrer that referred the candidate. When the candidate is referred by a referrer a cancellation task is created. The task is scheduled according to the ERTReferralValidityPeriod cie setting.

relation.name: CompetitiveOffers
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: Credentials
relation.description: The credentials informations that permit to the candidate to logon to the system for entering his general application or applied on requisition.

relation.name: Currency
relation.description: This is the currency that the candidate has entered to indicate in which currency the amount of dollars are.

relation.name: CurrentJob
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: DisqualifierResult
relation.description: The general profile disqualifier result of the candidate (knockout status). The candidate disqualifier result is set at the moment the candidate assesses himself to general company disqualification questions.

relation.name: DiversityAnswers
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: DriverLicense
relation.description: This relation is the candidate driver license.

relation.name: ExchangeUser
relation.description: Represent the information used between enterprise and TalentExchange when sending candidates to Exchange

relation.name: History
relation.description: All the application tracking history items related to the candidate. With the application tracking history items we can know everything about was has happened to the candidate during his hiring process.

relation.name: JobShifts
relation.description: Indicate for which job shifts the candidate is applying to. It can be day, evening, night, on call, etc.

relation.name: MilitaryServices
relation.description: This relation holds the candidate military service.

relation.name: OwnerAgent
relation.description: The agent that referred the candidate. When the candidate is referred by an agent a cancellation task is created. The task is scheduled according to the ERTReferralValidityPeriod cie setting.

relation.name: PreferredPhone
relation.description: This relation define the preferred phone the candidate want to be use as primary to contact him.

relation.name: QuestionAnswers
relation.description: Contains the candidate's answers to the profiler's questions.

relation.name: ReferralStatus
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: ResidenceLocation
relation.description: The location where the residence of the candidate is located. This field, when updated, will trigerred automatically the update of the geo conding informations.

relation.name: ShiftAvailability
relation.description: Define the relation between candidate and his shiftavailability. NOTE: The primary key of the table ShiftAvailability is the candidateNo.

relation.name: TalentUser
relation.description: The person by itself. It contains all the personal informations of the contact like is firstname, lastname, address, etc.

relation.name: TimeZone
relation.description: The timezone in which the candidate is applying.

relation.name: WorkConditions
relation.description: This contains the Work Conditions enter by a candidate related to the hourly world.

relation.name: Are you a current legacy - CSC employee?
Are you a former HP Intern?
RDP_Did you have any procurement responsibilities in any matter in which HP or any of its affiliates was a bidder or participant?
RDP_Do you have an official written description of your assigned job responsibilities?
RDP_Do you maintain any personal relationships with any current government procurement personnel that might present a conflict of interest or the appearance of a conflict of interest?
RDP_Have you been employed within the past five years by any federal, state or local government in one of the following roles / capacities listed below
RDP_If yes, have you obtained a waiver and/or disqualified yourself from participation in that matter
RDP_In an Executive Schedule position, Senior Executive Service, or general or flag officer positions, or
RDP_In any of the following DoD positions mentioned below
RDP_Were any of your procurement duties related to HP or the industries in which HP does business
RDP_Were you involved in any matters in which HP had or has a financial interest

entity.name: CandidateAnswerUpdate
entity.description: This class contains the state of an answer before changes occured. It contains what was answered.

field.name: Explanation
field.description: The explanation of the given answer to the question.

field.name: PossibleAnswerNumber
field.description: The old answer value that was given before change.

field.name: QuestionNumber
field.description: The question for which we have a change in the given answer.

relation.name: HistoryItem
relation.description: The item to which the candidate answer update is related to.

relation.name: InfoFeeder
relation.description: Indicate who provided the answer to the question.

relation.name: Origin
relation.description: To be documented.

entity.name: CandidateAttendee
entity.description: The CSUserAttendee is the meeting attendee representing the candidate, only one CSUserAttendee is allowed per meeting. A meeting does not necessarily have a CSUserAttendee.

relation.name: Candidate
relation.description: A CSUserAttendee is always linked to a CSUser.

entity.name: CandidateRegulationUpdate
entity.description: The history of modifications that were made to a regulation question answer. Replaces FieldUpdateDetail which only tracks Canada EE and USA EEO.

field.name: CreationDate
field.description: Holds the creation date of the entity.

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: Holds the last modification date of the entity.

entity.name: CandidateSearchLog
entity.description: Important note: While it is possible to filter candidate search log exports based on the candidate entity, doing so has important performance impacts on the customer zone. It is highly recommended to never perform candidate search log exports that filter on candidate information to avoid performance issues that would impact users.

entity.name: CandidateSelectionEvent
entity.description: This class is a lookup. It contains all the possbile events that can occured when a change happened during the selection process of the candidate.

field.name: Code
field.description: Public identifier of the candidate selection event.

field.name: DetailDescription
field.description: The detail description of the event. Explain the event itself.

relation.name: Category
relation.description: The event category to which the CandidateSelectionEvent belongs.

entity.name: CandidateSelectionEventCategory
entity.description: This is a lookup class. It contains all the categories of the events that can occured when a change happened during the selection process of the candidate.

field.name: Code
field.description: Public identifier of the candidate selection event category.

relation.name: Events
relation.description: All the Candidate Selection Event that are related to this category.

entity.name: CandidateSkillAnswerUpdate
entity.description: This class contains the state of a skill before changes occured. It contains what was answered. (removeCheckOnCreate=true,removeCheckOnRead=true, removeCheckOnUpdate=true, removeCheckOnDelete=true)

field.name: ExperienceLevelNumber
field.description: The experience level unique identifier that was answered before the changes.

field.name: InterestLevelNumber
field.description: The interest level unique identifier that was answered before the changes.

field.name: LastUsedLevelNumber
field.description: The last used level unique identifier that was answered before the changes.

field.name: ProficiencyLevelNumber
field.description: The proficiency level unique identifier that was answered before the changes.

field.name: SkillNumber
field.description: The skill for which we have a change in the given answer.

relation.name: HistoryItem
relation.description: The item to which the candidate skill update is related to.

relation.name: Origin
relation.description: To be documented.

entity.name: CandidateTrackingAttachedFileItem
entity.description: Candidate Tracking Attached File Item Entity.

entity.name: CandidateUpdate
entity.description: This class contains the modification that has been done on a field of the candidate.

field.name: LargeStringValue
field.description: When the modified value is to large to fit into the stringValue field (max 4000 char), we store the modified value into this field. An axample of that is when we modify an attached file.

field.name: Reference
field.description: This field is used to store a reference (unique identifier) on the value that has been modified. Example : when an operator modified the employer in an experience of candidate. A CandidateUpdate will be created, in the string value we will found the old employer's name. In the reference field we will found the unique identifier of the employer that is found in the employer table.

field.name: StringValue
field.description: The old value of the field modified, stored as a string.

relation.name: Event
relation.description: The event that fired the creation of the candidate update.

relation.name: HistoryItem
relation.description: The item to which the candidate update is related to.

relation.name: UDFDefinition
relation.description: To be documented.

entity.name: CandidateUpdateEvent
entity.description: This is a lookup class. It contains all the possible events that can be triggered when a something change into the candidate file. Each event is associated to a metafield. Each change made to this metafield will triggered the event associated to it.

field.name: Code
field.description: Lookup indicating the nature of the change that occured on the candidate entity.

entity.name: Certification
entity.description: A certification is one element that defines the talent profile of a candidate or employee. The notion of certification refers to an official recognition of skills and knowledge in a specific area. A certification is emitted by an authorized provider. All certifications are defined in the standard Taleo library - it is not possible for customers to add new elements. However, customers can activate/deactivate elements.

field.name: Active
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: CreationDate
field.description: The creation date of the entity

field.name: Description
field.description: This attribute describes the certification.

field.name: LastModificationDate
field.description: The date of the last modification of the entity

field.name: Number
field.description: This attribute is the certification identifier. Use the Number to search and identify the certification to update.

relation.name: Status
relation.description: The Administration Entity status of the administration entity

entity.name: CieEmployer
entity.description: This entity represents an employer where a candidate acquired work experience.

field.name: CreationDate
field.description: the creation date of the employer

field.name: Description
field.description: The name of the employer.

field.name: LastModificationDate
field.description: The last modification date of the employer

field.name: Number
field.description: The unique internal id of the Employer

relation.name: Status
relation.description: The status of the CieEmployer

entity.name: CieInstitution
entity.description: This entity represents a place designated for learning. It is the educational institution where people learn specific knowledge.

field.name: CreationDate
field.description: The last creation date of the institution

field.name: Description
field.description: This field is the name of the institution.

field.name: LastModificationDate
field.description: The last modification date of the institution

field.name: Number
field.description: The unique identifier of this entity.

relation.name: Location
relation.description: Contains the location of the institution.

relation.name: Status
relation.description: The status of the Institution

relation.name: Type
relation.description: Indicate the type of institution. University, College, school, etc,,,

entity.name: CieProgram
entity.description: This entity represents an educational program. It's a field of study. For example: Information Technology, Journalism, Political Science, etc...

field.name: CreationDate
field.description: The creation date of the Study

field.name: Description
field.description: This field is the name of the program in multiplie languages.

field.name: LastModificationDate
field.description: The last modification date of the Study

relation.name: Status
relation.description: The status of the Program

entity.name: CitizenshipStatus
entity.description: Represents the different citizenship statuses.

entity.name: Competency
entity.description: A competency is knowledge, a skill or an ability. Competencies are contained in the Taleo Competencies List.

field.name: Alias
field.description: Customer specific multilingual competency name.

field.name: Description
field.description: Multilingual description of the competency. This field supports rich-text markup. Descriptions may also be contextualized to specific OLF values using competency definitions.

field.name: DescriptionText
field.description: Multilingual plain text version of the description.

field.name: InternalCode
field.description: Taleo unique identifier used as entity key.

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: Holds the last modification date of the entity.

relation.name: CompetencyCategories
relation.description: The competency categories associated to the competency.

relation.name: CompetencyDefinitions
relation.description: The competency definitions associated to the competency.

relation.name: CompetencyGroup
relation.description: The competency group associated to the competency.

relation.name: CompetencyProvider
relation.description: Competency provider associated to the competency.

relation.name: CompetencyType
relation.description: Customer specific competency type associated to competency.

relation.name: DefaultCompetencyType
relation.description: Default competency type associated to competency.

relation.name: NetworkJobFields
relation.description: Network job fields associated to Competency.

relation.name: PrimaryNetworkJobField
relation.description: Primary network job field associated to Competency.

relation.name: RatingModel
relation.description: Rating model associated to Competency.

relation.name: SubCompetencies
relation.description: Sub-competencies associated to the competency.

entity.name: CompetencyCategory
entity.description: A competency category is a way for classifying competencies. Competencies are mainly used for filtering purposes. A competency can be associated to many categories.

field.name: Description
field.description: The multilingual description of the competency category.

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: Holds the last modification date of the entity.

relation.name: Competencies
relation.description: The competencies associated to the competency category.

entity.name: CompetencyDefinition
entity.description: A Competency Definition provides a specific description for an associated context. It overrides the default competency description when the competency is used within a specific context.

relation.name: Competency
relation.description: The competency associated to the competency definition.

entity.name: CompetencyGroup
entity.description: A competency group is a way for classifying competencies. Groups are mainly used for filtering and display grouping purposes. A competency can be associated to one group.

field.name: Description
field.description: The multilingual description of the competency group.

field.name: DisplaySequence
field.description: The display sequence of the competency group.

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: Holds the last modification date of the entity.

entity.name: CompetencyProvider
entity.description: A competency provider owns a library of competencies and other related content that can be used by the client.

field.name: Description
field.description: The description of the competency provider

relation.name: Parent
relation.description: The parent competency provider.

entity.name: CompetencyType
entity.description: Competency types provide a way to group and organize competencies. There are three types of competencies: job specific, language, and behavioral competencies.

field.name: Code
field.description: Unique identifier of the competency type.

entity.name: CompetitiveOffer
entity.description: The competitive offer information accompanies the candidate and indicates at what levels offers were made. This is useful in determining whether or not an offer is to be made to the candidate, and it serves as a guideline to the type (level) of offer that must be made. In future versions, this information will also be useful in providing market information for specific jobs.

field.name: CompetitiveJobDescription
field.description: Multilingual string field used to provide a description for the competitive job.

field.name: CompetitiveJobTitle
field.description: Multilingual string field used to hold the competitive job title.

field.name: CompetitiveOfferDate
field.description: The date when the competitive offer was captured.

field.name: CompetitiveOtherEmployer
field.description: Multilingual string field used to capture the other competitive employer values. This occurs when the competitive employer does not belong to the known employers list.

field.name: CompetitiveSequence
field.description: The competiviteSequence defines the capture sequence and is used to determine the competitive offer name.

relation.name: CompetitiveCieEmployer
relation.description: Link to a CieEmployer which is considered a competitive employer.

relation.name: CompetitiveCieJobField
relation.description: Link to a CieJobField which is considered a competitive job field.

relation.name: CompetitiveCieLocation
relation.description: Link to a NetworkLocation

entity.name: CompletionLevel
entity.description: The completion level for an entity Requisition: for approval, for saving, etc. Candidate: for saving Offer: for saving

field.name: Code
field.description: Public identifier of the entity.

entity.name: CorporateRecruitmentSource
entity.description: Represents the presence of a Recruitment Source in the corporate source list, which is a working set of the most frequently used sources.

field.name: InProfiler
field.description: Determines if Recruitment Source is included in the list of answers to the question about where the candidate heard about the company.

field.name: InRequisition
field.description: Determines if Recruitment Source is included in the list of default answers to the question about where the candidate heard about the job. This list is built when first posting the requisition, according to this switch and how well the source's location, job and organization context fits with the requisition.

relation.name: RecruitmentSource
relation.description: The related Recruitment Source.

entity.name: CoverageArea
entity.description: Coverage area is the base entity used to grant access based on dimensions (O, L, F)

field.name: Code
field.description: The code of the coverage area

entity.name: Credentials
entity.description: Credential is the representation of all authentication information and identification information used to authenticate a career section user.

field.name: ForcePasswordChange
field.description: This flags tells if the credential will be forced to change is password once he will be authenticated properly.

field.name: Guid
field.description: Global unique identifier for this credential. This is then used to find this user across Taleo's products

field.name: Password
field.description: Credential's password. The password is hashed so that nobody can read it.

field.name: SSOID
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: Username
field.description: Credential's user name.

field.name: UsernameMigrated
field.description: This flags checks if the migration mechanism is showed to the credential. This flag will be enabled if his username is his email address. Once the user has changed is user name from his email address to a valid user name, this flag is set to false. Then, this user will not be able to access the migration mechanism again.

relation.name: Agent
relation.description: Agent entity related to this entity.

relation.name: Candidate
relation.description: Candidate entity related to this credential.

entity.name: CrudConfiguration
entity.description: CrudConfiguration is the parent of all entities that use the CRUD (Create Read Update Delete) model to import data from partners. It is implemented in products that use import services rather than the ExtensionRequest model.

entity.name: CSWMotive
entity.description: The CSWMotive entity represents a motive that can be created to describe an event (for example, 'Canceled the interview'). The CSWMotive also has a mnemonic and an availability flag which are inherited from the CSWObject. The CSWMotive is described as a Qualifier in the application administration section.

field.name: Description
field.description: The CSWMotive multilingual description.

field.name: Name
field.description: The CSWMotive multilingual name.

entity.name: CSWMotiveDomain
entity.description: The CSWMotiveDomain represents a set of configured motives. The CSWMotiveDomain also has a mnemonic and an availability flag which are inherited from the CSWObject. The CSWMotiveDomain is described as a Qualifier Group in the application administration section.

field.name: Description
field.description: The CSWMotiveDomain multilingual description.

field.name: Name
field.description: The CSWMotiveDomain multilingual name.

relation.name: MotiveUsage
relation.description: The CSWMotiveDomain can be associated with one or more CSWMotiveDomainCSWMotiveUsage.

entity.name: CSWMotiveDomainCSWMotiveUsage
entity.description: The CSWMotiveDomainCSWMotiveUsage is the intersection between motives and motive domains.

relation.name: Motive
relation.description: CSWMotive associated with this CSWMotiveDomainCSWMotiveUsage.

relation.name: MotiveDomain
relation.description: The CSWMotiveDomain associated with this CSWMotiveDomainCSWMotiveUsage.

entity.name: CSWObject
entity.description: The CSWObject is an abstract entity providing an availability flag and a mnemonic to many of the CSW entities; CSWAction, CSWMotive, CSWMotiveDomain, CSWOperation, CSWStatus, CSWStatusShortcut, CSWStep and CSWWorkflow.

field.name: Available
field.description: The 'available' attribute is a Boolean flag specifying if the entity is available or not.

field.name: Mnemonic
field.description: The 'mnemonic' attribute is simply an identifier for the CSW entity. It's not multilingual.

entity.name: CSWStatus
entity.description: The CSW Status represents a portion of a Step. The steps are made of statuses and when these statuses are completed, the step is considered complete.

field.name: ActiveEventDate
field.description: Boolean flag specifying if the tracking history for this status can have a modified event date.

field.name: Description
field.description: The CSWStatus multilingual description.

field.name: Name
field.description: The CSWStatus multilingual name.

relation.name: ApplicationState
relation.description: Link to the application state.

relation.name: MotiveDomainUsage
relation.description: Link to the CSWStatusMotiveDomainUsage which is basically the intersection between MotiveDomains and Status.

entity.name: CSWStatusMotiveDomainUsage
entity.description: The CSWStatusMotiveDomainUsage is an entity of intersection between Status and MotiveDomains.

relation.name: MotiveDomain
relation.description: The motive domain to associate with the status.

relation.name: Status
relation.description: The Status to associate with the motive domain.

entity.name: CSWStatusUsage
entity.description: The CSWStatusUsage entity is used to determine the usage of a status. A CSWStep is made of many CSWStatusUsage.

field.name: AllConstraintsMustBeValid
field.description: Boolean flag specifying if all the constraints must be valid.

field.name: AutoFlow
field.description: Boolean flag specifying if this status can be used by the autoflow. False is the default value.

field.name: ConditionnalCompletenessAllowed
field.description: Boolean flag specifying if conditional completeness is allowed.

field.name: Initial
field.description: Boolean flag specifying if the CSWStatusUsage is the initial step (step initial one).

field.name: MeetingCompliant
field.description: Boolean flag specifying is the status is meeting compliant. False is the default value.

field.name: NewEntryNotificationNumber
field.description: This is a flag specifying the type of notification: none, recruiter, hiring manager, etc..

field.name: QueueAndRouteShortcutNumber
field.description: This is the id of the Change status button shortcut which can be configured in the admin section.

field.name: RsCSWAskForCommentModeNumber
field.description: This flag specifies the type of comments: optional or mandatory.

field.name: RsCSWAskForMotiveModeNumber
field.description: This is a flag specifying the type of Motives (qualifiers).

relation.name: ProgressionLevel
relation.description: Link to the CSWStepProgressionLevel, which is a lookup defining the state of the step associated with this status, it can be NOT_STARTED, IN_PROGRESS or COMPLETED.

relation.name: Status
relation.description: Link to the CSWStatus associated with this Status usage.

relation.name: Step
relation.description: Link to the CSWStep associated with this status usage.

entity.name: CSWStep
entity.description: The CSWStep represents the elements of a workflow. A workflow contains steps which contain statuses. Usage entities are used to group these elements together.

field.name: Description
field.description: The CSWStep multilingual description.

field.name: Name
field.description: The CSWStep multilingual name.

field.name: ShortName
field.description: The CSWStep multilingual short name. It is used in lists.

relation.name: ApplicationState
relation.description: Link to the Application state which indicates the state of the current application.

relation.name: StatusUsages
relation.description: Link to the StatusUsage which represents the usages for this step.

entity.name: CSWStepProgressionLevel
entity.description: This lookup gives a progression indicator for a status in the context of its step.

entity.name: CSWStepUsage
entity.description: The CSWStepUsage defines the usage for a step by associating a step to a workflow. A workflow is made of step usages.

field.name: ConditionalEntryAllowed
field.description: Boolean flag specifying if a conditional entry is allowed. The default value is False.

field.name: Mandatory
field.description: Boolean flag specifying if the step is mandatory. False is the default value.

field.name: NewEntryNotificationNumber
field.description: Flag specifying the type of notifications.

field.name: Restricted
field.description: Boolean flag specifying the step is restricted.

relation.name: Step
relation.description: Link to the step associated with the workflow.

relation.name: Workflow
relation.description: Link to the workflow associated with the step.

entity.name: CSWTrace
entity.description: This entity stores the progression of the candidate on the selection workflow

entity.name: CSWUsage
entity.description: The CSWUsage is an abstract entity providing an availability flag and a sequence to some CSW entities such as motives, operations, steps and actions. Also the implementations of the CSWUsage entity specifies how the entity should be used.

field.name: Active
field.description: Boolean flag specifying if the entity is available or not.

field.name: Sequence
field.description: Integer specifying the entity sequence.

entity.name: CSWWorkflow
entity.description: A CSWWorkflow is basically a set of steps a candidate will go through. Flags, actions, conditions, etc.can be associated to these steps.

field.name: Description
field.description: The CSWWorkflow multilingual description.

field.name: IsDefault
field.description: Boolean flag specifying if this workflow is the default workflow. When a requisition is created, the default workflow is selected.

field.name: Name
field.description: The CSWWorkflow multilingual name.

relation.name: JobField
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: Locations
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: Organisations
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: RequisitionTypes
relation.description: Link to the standard hire type of the CSWWorkflow

relation.name: StepUsage
relation.description: A workflow can have one or more CSWStepUsage. A CSWStepUsage is basically a CSWUsage but is specific to a CSWStep.

entity.name: Currency
entity.description: This entity is a lookup representing a form of money that is in public circulation.

field.name: BaseCurrencyRatio
field.description: This field is the value of the currency in US dollars. This field is monthly updated.

field.name: ISO4217Abbreviation
field.description: This field represents the ISO4217 alphabetic code of the currency. In most cases, it is composed of the country's two-character Internet country code plus an extra character to denote the currency unit. For example, the code for Canadian Dollars is simply Canada's two-character Internet code ("CA") plus a one-character currency designator ("D").

field.name: ISO4217Code
field.description: This field represents the ISO4217 numeric code of the currency.

field.name: Symbol
