field.description: This field is the symbol of the currency. For instance th symbol of the US dollar is '$'.

entity.name: CurrentJob
entity.description: The ArtCurrentJob is used to provide information about the candidate current job when applicable. The ArtCurrentJob extends ArtAbstractOffer and provides also all the necessary information about the current candidate wage.

field.name: CurrentJobJobDescription
field.description: A multilingual string field that provides a description for the current job.

field.name: CurrentJobJobTitle
field.description: Multilingual string field used to hold the current job title.

field.name: CurrentJobOfferDate
field.description: The date when the currentJob offer was captured.

field.name: CurrentJobOtherEmployer
field.description: A multilingual string field used to capture the other employer value for the current job. This occurs when the current job employer does not belong to the known employers list.

relation.name: CurrentJobCieEmployer
relation.description: Link to a CieEmployer that is the current employer.

relation.name: CurrentJobCieJobField
relation.description: Link to a CieJobField that is the current job field.

relation.name: CurrentJobCieLocation
relation.description: Link to a NetworkLocation.

entity.name: CustomSelection
entity.description: Represents a user-defined selection in akirax

field.name: SortUsingName
field.description: Indicates if this selection should be ordered alphabetically or not.

entity.name: DatabaseLookup
entity.description: Base entity type for all database lookup entities in this model.

field.name: Description
field.description: Textual representation of the entity.

field.name: Number
field.description: The physical key of the entity.

entity.name: Department
entity.description: Class that represents a department of the company.

field.name: CostCenter
field.description: The department cost center (multilingual).

field.name: CustomerID
field.description: The Department internal identifier specified by the customer. Used for referencing a department identifier known in another external system for integration purposes.

field.name: EffectiveFrom
field.description: The date when the department is effective.

field.name: EffectiveTill
field.description: The date when the department stops being effective.

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: The last modification date of the department

field.name: Number
field.description: The unique identifier of this entity.

field.name: PayFactor
field.description: The department Pay Factor (eg: 1 = 100%).

relation.name: DepartmentInformation
relation.description: The departmentInformation linked to the department (for internal use only).

relation.name: HiringManager
relation.description: The hiring manager associated to the department.

relation.name: Location
relation.description: The department location.

relation.name: OfferPreferredApprovers
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: Organization
relation.description: The department organization.

relation.name: Parent
relation.description: The department parent of the current department.

relation.name: Recruiter
relation.description: The recruiter associated to the department.

relation.name: RequisitionPreferredApprovers
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: State
relation.description: The department state associated to the current department.

entity.name: DepartmentInformation
entity.description: The departmentInformation is linked to the department (use internally only).

field.name: Number
field.description: The unique identifier of this entity.

entity.name: DepartmentState
entity.description: Class that represents the state of the department.

field.name: Code
field.description: Public identifier of the entity

entity.name: DisplayObject
entity.description: This is a display option. Possible values can be radio button, check box, drop down, etc.

entity.name: DisqualifierResult
entity.description: This is a disqualifier result. Each possible answer of a disqualification question must have a disqualifier result. It indicates the behavior result to the system when the candidate provides its answers to disqualification questions. Possible values can be Passed, To Be Verified or Failed.

entity.name: DistanceMeasurementUnits
entity.description: The distance measurements lookup. Values are: 1-kilometers; 2-Miles

field.name: Code
field.description: Distance measurement unit unique identifier

entity.name: DistanceMeasureUnit
entity.description: This lookup entity represents a measurement Unit. For example: Kilometers or Miles.

field.name: Code
field.description: Public identifier of the distance measure unit.

entity.name: DiversityAnswer
entity.description: This is the concrete entity of an answer used for regulation purposes.

relation.name: CandidatePerformer
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: PossibleAnswer
relation.description: Ths possible answer associated to the answer. This is one of the answer choices. A single answer question must have only one possible answer associated to the answer. The TextAnswer attribute is ignored. A multiple answer question may lead to multiple answers. The TextAnswer attribute is ignored. A text answer question must not have any possible answer associated to the answer. The TextAnswer attribute must be filled.

relation.name: RecruiterPerformer
relation.description: To be documented.

entity.name: DiversityForm
entity.description: This is the concrete entity of a question form used for regulation purposes. A regulation form is linked to a company locations.

relation.name: Location
relation.description: The Company Locations to which the form is linked. If not empty, the form is company specific

entity.name: DiversityPossibleAnswer
entity.description: This is the concrete entity of a possible answer used for regulation purposes.

relation.name: PossibleAnswerType
relation.description: This is the associated type for this question.

entity.name: DiversityPossibleAnswerType
entity.description: This is the type of a possible answers. Possible values Undisclosed, Not Specified are applicable for all regulation question types. Other types only apply to one question type.

entity.name: DiversityQuestion
entity.description: This is the concrete entity of a question used for regulation purposes.

relation.name: RegulationForm
relation.description: To be documented.

entity.name: DiversityQuestionScope
entity.description: This is a question scope. It defines the scope of a question.

entity.name: DiversityQuestionType
entity.description: This is the type of regulation question. Ethnicity, race and gender are a few examples configured in the system. This information is set for a question only when QuestionType = REGULATION

relation.name: PossibleAnswerTypes
relation.description: This is the list of possible answer types associated to this question regulation type.

entity.name: Document
entity.description: Root object

entity.name: DriverLicense
entity.description: This class holds the fields related to the candidate driver's license.

field.name: LicenseNumber
field.description: This field holds the license driver number.

relation.name: DriverLicenseLocation
relation.description: Contains the locatiion of the driver licence.

entity.name: EEOUSAVersion
entity.description: This is the employment equity question version for the USA only. It indicates the version of employment equity in the USA. This information is set only for employment equity questions.

entity.name: ElectronicSignature
entity.description: This class define the values need to identity the electronic signature of a candidate related to the application flow is used.

field.name: DateTimeSigned
field.description: This field hold the value for the date and time the electronic signature occurs.

field.name: EmailAddress
field.description: This field define the email address of the candidate associated with this electronic document.

field.name: Identifier
field.description: This field define the unique ID of the candidate associated with this electronic document.

field.name: Initials
field.description: This field define the initial of the candidate associated with this electronic document.

field.name: IPAddress
field.description: This field hold the value for the IP address of the computer used by the candidate.

field.name: Name
field.description: This field define the name of the candidate that has fill the electronic document.

relation.name: ElectronicSignatureDocuments
relation.description: The documents of the electronic signature.

entity.name: EmailState
entity.description: This class contains the states that an email can have.

field.name: Code
field.description: Public identifier of the email state.

entity.name: EmployeeStatus
entity.description: The current employment status of the employee.

field.name: Code
field.description: The unique code of this enumeration value.

entity.name: EmploymentEquityEstablishment
entity.description: This is the employment equity establishment.

field.name: Description
field.description: This is the multilingual description for this employment equity establishment.

entity.name: EmploymentEquityJobCategory
entity.description: This is the employment equity job category. Each job category is associated to a Taleo location. Job categories are organized in a hierarchical structure. The first level represents the category; the second level is the group. Job categories are also organized by version so there can be more than one structure for each location.

field.name: Number
field.description: This is the entity key

relation.name: Descriptions
relation.description: This is the associated list of descriptions for this employment equity job category.

relation.name: NetworkLocation
relation.description: This is the associated Taleo location for this employment equity job category.

relation.name: Parent
relation.description: This is the associated parent element for this employment equity job category.

entity.name: EmploymentEquityJobCategoryDescription
entity.description: This is the employment equity job category description.

field.name: Description
field.description: Indicates the description.

field.name: TheLocale
field.description: Indicates the locale of the description.

relation.name: EEOJobCategory
relation.description: This is the associated employment equity job category for this employment equity job category description.

relation.name: Version
relation.description: This is the associated version for this employment equity job category

entity.name: EmploymentEquityQuestionType
entity.description: This is the type of employment equity question. Ethnicity, race and gender are a few examples configured in the system. This information is se: for a question only when TypeOfQuestion = EEO

entity.name: EmploymentStatus
entity.description: Employee Status lookup values. It determines the desired person's employement status.

entity.name: Entity
entity.description: Base entity type for all entities in this model.

entity.name: EntityField
entity.description: The class entity models entity fields available to the application. An entity field may be system defined (known entity fields) or user defined (UDF). System defined fields are provided by the system, user defined fields are added/deleted by the administrator of the system.

entity.name: EOfferESignature
entity.description: This class define the values need to identity the electronic signature of a candidate related to the e-offer.

entity.name: EOfferType
entity.description: The EOfferType is a resource lookup. The initial values are StatticDefaultTaleoEOffer and TransitionBasedEOffer.

entity.name: Evaluation
entity.description: Entity that represents an evaluation score of a candidate on a specific requisition. Evaluation score is entered by interviewers.

entity.name: ExchangeStatus
entity.description: Status used between Talent Exchange and Enterprise when sending candidate to Exchange.

field.name: Code
field.description: The code (unique id) of the ExchangeStatus

field.name: IsUsable
field.description: Flag to distinguish which status can be set to the ExchangeUser and which cannot.

entity.name: ExchangeUser
entity.description: removeCheckOnCreate=true, removeCheckOnUpdate=true)

field.name: ExchangeStatusDate
field.description: The exchange status date of the exchange user

field.name: IsExchangeRejected
field.description: Indicate if the candidate is rejected or not in a point of view of Talent Exchange.

field.name: Number
field.description: The unique identifier of this entity.

field.name: PurchasedOwnerGuid
field.description: The user that has submit a candidate into Talent exchange and that was successfuly bought.

relation.name: Candidate
relation.description: The CSUSer linked to the EchangeUser

relation.name: ExchangeStatus
relation.description: The exchange status of the exchange user

entity.name: Expectation
entity.description: Represents a basic meta-entity that captures the expectations from a candidate who applied on a given requisition at any time (as long as the application exists). Candidate expectations are basically the terms that the candidate would admittedly accept or refuse. These are gathered through a process that some may refer to as the "Test offer". It provides the user with crucial data regarding candidate expectations at both ends of the spectrum (low end range = Will definitely refuse, high end range = Can't refuse or Will definitely accept). Candidate expectations also include the information as to the terms that the candidate enjoys in his "current job".

field.name: ExpectationOfferDate
field.description: Date when the offer expectation was captured.

relation.name: Application
relation.description: Link to the expectation offer related to this application.

relation.name: ExpectationType
relation.description: Link to an expectation type. This is a lookup that defines what the candidate may do. For example;:WILL_REFUSE, WILL_ACCEPT, DESIRES.

entity.name: ExpectationType
entity.description: At design time, the initial values are "willAccept", "desires" and "willRefuse". Please refer to class implementation for the most up-to-date list of values.

entity.name: Experience
entity.description: This entity represents an experience that a person has working, or working in a specific field or occupation. (removeCheckOnCreate=true,removeCheckOnRead=true, removeCheckOnUpdate=true, removeCheckOnDelete=true)

field.name: BeginDate
field.description: This field is the date when the candidate began working for this job.

field.name: CurrentEmployer
field.description: This field indicates if it is or not the employer for whom the candidate is currently working.

field.name: DisplaySequence
field.description: This field determines the order to display this experience among the candidate's experiences. It's also a part of the key (Candidate, Requisition, PorfileLangange, displaySequence) identifying a specific candidate's experience for a specific application and for a specific profile language.

field.name: EndDate
field.description: This field is the date when the candidate stopped working for this job.

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: The last modification date ot the Experience

field.name: NameWhileEmployed
field.description: This field defines the name the candidate was using when working for this company.

field.name: Number
field.description: The unique internal id of the entity

field.name: OtherEmployerName
field.description: This field is used when the candidate's employer is not listed in the employers list. It contains the candidate's employer name.

field.name: OtherJobTitle
field.description: This field is used when the candidate's job function is not listed in the job functions list. It contains the candidate's job function name.

field.name: PermissionToContact
field.description: This field hold the value to identity if the recruiter have the permission to contact the old supervisor.

field.name: ReasonForLeaving
field.description: Contains the reason why the person left this employer.

field.name: Responsibility
field.description: This field is the description of the responsibilities the candidate had or has for this job.

field.name: Supervisor
field.description: This field is the name of the candidate's supervisor.

field.name: SupervisorEmail
field.description: This field hold the value of the supervisor address email.

field.name: SupervisorPhone
field.description: This field is the phone number of the candidate's supervisor.

field.name: SupervisorTitle
field.description: This field hold the value of the supervisor title during the employment.

relation.name: Application
relation.description: Link the experience to the profile information.

relation.name: Employer
relation.description: This field represents the employer related to the candidate's experience.

relation.name: JobFunction
relation.description: This field represents the job function related to the candidate's experience.

relation.name: Location
relation.description: Indicate where this employer is located.

entity.name: ExtensionConfiguration
entity.description: ExtensionConfiguration is the parent of all entities that use the extension model to save data received from partners. It is implemented in products that use the Passport request model rather than import services.

field.name: ValidityPeriod
field.description: Time period in days for request and associated results to remain valid. Validity period is ignored when validity period type is PARTNER_DEFINED.

relation.name: ValidityPeriodType
relation.description: ValidityPeriodType associated to ExtensionConfiguration

entity.name: ExtensionMechanism
entity.description: The ExtensionMechanism is a multilingual lookup enumerating the valid mechanisms to extend an offer. These values are not customizable. The initial values are "e-mail", "verbally", "letter" and "e-offer". Please refer to database for currently used values.

entity.name: ExtensionParameter
entity.description: Customizable entity that contains parameters associated to a specific request or a specific partner.

relation.name: Partner
relation.description: Passport partner associated to extension parameter.

entity.name: ExtensionRequest
entity.description: ExtensionRequest corresponds to a single Passport request submitted to a partner. Passport partners reference that request when supplying processing results.

field.name: CreationDate
field.description: Request creation date and time.

field.name: ExternalReference
field.description: Provider request identifier.

field.name: InternalReference
field.description: Taleo request identifier.

field.name: IsExpired
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: Last date and time on which request was modified. Including modifications to status, validity period, result, and result set.

field.name: ProviderStatus
field.description: Last provider status sent for request.

field.name: ValidityExpirationDate
field.description: Date and time on which request expires. Expired requests are not reusable.

relation.name: Parameter
relation.description: ExtensionParameter associated to request.

relation.name: Result
relation.description: ExtensionResult associated to request. Results fields from the provider are associated to this entity and will be populated when provider responds to a request.

relation.name: Status
relation.description: ExtensionRequestStatus associated to this request.

relation.name: ValidityPeriodType
relation.description: ValidityPeriodType associated to this request.

entity.name: ExtensionRequestStatus
entity.description: Lookup values for possible extension request statuses.

field.name: Code
field.description: Extension Request Status unique identifier.

relation.name: Type
relation.description: ExtensionRequestStatusType associated to ExtensionRequestStatus

entity.name: ExtensionRequestStatusType
entity.description: Lookup values for extension request status types. CompleteType: successful completion. ErrorType: failure to complete. RunningType: in progress.

entity.name: ExtensionResult
entity.description: Customizable entity that contains results associated to a specific request. It contains a list of fields, defined in the certification, that globally characterize the result of a request.

relation.name: Request
relation.description: Request associated to result.

relation.name: Set
relation.description: Result set associated to result.

entity.name: ExtensionResultSet
entity.description: Customizable entity that contains result set associated to a specific request result. A resultset is a subset of fields, defined in the certification, that are sent multiple times by a provider.

relation.name: Result
relation.description: Result set associated to result.

entity.name: FieldConfidentiality
entity.description: Contains the configurable metaClass Known configurable metaClass are: Requisition, Candidate, Offer, Department

entity.name: FieldUpdateDetail
entity.description: This class contains the modification that has been done for an answer to a EEO question.

field.name: PossibleAnswerNumber
field.description: The answer unique identifier old answer that was given..

field.name: QuestionNumber
field.description: The question unique identifier for which the update occured.

relation.name: HistoryItem
relation.description: The item to which the candidate skill update is related to.

relation.name: InfoFeeder
relation.description: Who provided the answer to the question.

entity.name: FormatOfQuestion
entity.description: This is the format of Question. It indicates how it can be answered. Possible values are Single Answer, Multiple Answer and Text Answer.

entity.name: FunctionalDomain
entity.description: Functional Domains are used to classify Functional Permissions

field.name: Code
field.description: The code of the functional domain

field.name: Name
field.description: The name of the functional domain

entity.name: FunctionalRole
entity.description: The user defined role represent a role that is created and modified by the user. This role can have a regional assignee. The user defined role must have a default assignee to fall back when no other user can be resolved.

relation.name: RegionalAssignees
relation.description: To be documented.

entity.name: Group
entity.description: Group entity that defines a set of users

field.name: Description
field.description: Group's description

field.name: Name
field.description: Group's name

relation.name: OLFCoverageAreas
relation.description: To be documented.

entity.name: HierarchicalRole
entity.description: The Hierarchical role represent a role hierarchy within a business. This role is assigned to users. There can be one and only one parent of the role in the hierarchy..

entity.name: HireType
entity.description: HireType This lookup entity indicates the hire type used (Professional, Hourly, Campus, etc.).

entity.name: HRMS
entity.description: Contains the different HRMS that can provide data to the system (0 = Taleo system)

field.name: Description
field.description: A description of the HRMS System.

relation.name: Children
relation.description: Link to children HRMS.

relation.name: Parent
relation.description: Link to parent HRMS.

entity.name: ICalendar
entity.description: Contains the mandatory field that is to the implementation of the iCalendar specification.

field.name: Sequence
field.description: The sequence as described in the iCalendar specification.

field.name: UniqueIdentifier
field.description: The unique identifier as described in the iCalendar specification.

entity.name: Industry
entity.description: Class that represents the Taleo Reference Industry

field.name: Code
field.description: Unique identifier allowing providing a meaningful key

field.name: Number
field.description: Unique identifier generated by system

entity.name: InfoFeeder
entity.description: This lookup entity indicates who has feed the information about a candidate (Recruiter, Agent, ...)

field.name: Code
field.description: Public identifier of the info feeder.

entity.name: InterestInternationalAssignment
entity.description: Interest Internaltional Assignment lookup values. It determines the level of interest for a person in beeing relocated internationally.

field.name: Code
field.description: The unique code of this enumeration value.

entity.name: InterviewEval
entity.description: Represents the collection of questions used for evaluating the interviewees.

entity.name: InterviewEvalPossibleAnswer
entity.description: A Possible Anwser to a Question linked to an evaluation.

entity.name: InterviewEvalQuestion
entity.description: A Question linked to an evaluation

entity.name: JobBoard
entity.description: This entity is an electronic media defining a job site, a career site, a news group, a mailing list, etc. This is a site where the job offers are posted.

field.name: ExternalSystem
field.description: This field represents the external system related to the job board. For instance, a job board coming from an external system like eQuest.

field.name: IsPaying
field.description: This field indicates if the posting on the job board is free or not.

field.name: JobboardTerm
field.description: This field indicates the duration of the posting (1=30 days, 2=60 days, 3=45 days). When it is null, this means that there is no term (not applicable).

field.name: MultipostingVendorMediaID
field.description: This field represents the media name related to the job board provided by an external system like eQuest.

relation.name: JobboardType
relation.description: This field is the type of the job board. The possible types are: (1=Free Job Board, 2=Fee-based Job Board, 3=News Group, 4=Mailing List, 5=External, 6=Intranet, 7=Staffing Agency Portal).

relation.name: RecruitmentSource
relation.description: Link to the recruitment source of the Jobboard.

entity.name: JobboardType
entity.description: This class contains all the jobboard type for a jobboard.

entity.name: JobField
entity.description: Class that represents company-specific Job Fields. This is the list of company employment domains, with a hierarchical view.

field.name: CustomerID
field.description: The JobField internal identifier specified by the customer. Used for referencing a jobfield identifier known in another external system for integration purposes.

field.name: Locked
field.description: Indicates if jobfield is locked or not

relation.name: NetworkJobField
relation.description: Associated Network JobField for this Company JobField

entity.name: JobFieldLevel
entity.description: Company JobField specific level

entity.name: JobFieldQuestion
entity.description: This is the association between a company job field and a question. This information is pertinent for Prescreening and Disqualification questions. It indicates the pertinence of a question according to associated job fields.

field.name: IsInModel
field.description: Indicates if the association between the job field and the question is pertinent for a Prescreening Model. This information is applicable only to Prescreening questions.

field.name: IsInProfiler
field.description: Indicates if the association between the job field and the question is pertinent for a Candidate Profiler. This information is applicable only to Prescreening questions.

field.name: ModelDisplaySequence
field.description: Indicates the sequence ordering of the question in a Prescreening Model when this question appears to be pertinent according to the associated job field.

field.name: ProfilerDisplaySequence
field.description: Indicates the sequence ordering of the question in a Candidate Profiler when this question appears to be pertinent according to the associated job field.

relation.name: JobField
relation.description: This is the associated company job field.

relation.name: Question
relation.description: This is the associated question.

entity.name: JobFieldSequence
entity.description: Company JobField specific sequence

entity.name: JobInformation
entity.description: Represents data that is common to Requisition and Job Template.

field.name: AdditionalInformation
field.description: Additional information regarding JobInformation.

field.name: AutoDeclineCandidates
field.description: This field indicates if candidates are to be declined on other requisitions when the requisition is closed (fill).

field.name: AutoRejectCandidates
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: BillRateMedian
field.description: Median bill rate of a requisition.

field.name: BillRateNotToExceed
field.description: Bill rate not to exceed (maximum).

field.name: CreationDate
field.description: The creation date of JobInformation.

field.name: CreationFlowTypeDimensionNo
field.description: Identifies the flow type dimension from which the job information has been created.

field.name: DepartmentString
field.description: The department string value of JobInformation (used when Department is not enabled).

field.name: DescriptionActive
field.description: Indicates the languages activated for JobInformation.

field.name: DescriptionBaseLocale
field.description: The base locale for the JobInformation description.

field.name: DescriptionExternalHTML
field.description: The external description of JobInformation (multilingual).

field.name: DescriptionInternalHTML
field.description: The internal description of JobInformation (multilingual).

field.name: EmploymentEquityJobCategory
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: EmploymentEquityJobGroup
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: EmploymentEquityOccupationalGroup
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: ExternalBonusAmount
field.description: Public Referral Bonus Amount.

field.name: ExternalBonusTracking
field.description: Indicates if Public Referral Bonus is enabled.

field.name: ExternalQualificationHTML
field.description: The external qualification of JobInformation (multilingual).

field.name: HighQuartileSalary
field.description: The high quartile salary of JobInformation. Marketplace comparisons for comparable jobs; usually from salary surveys from HR consulting companies such as Mercer.

field.name: InternalBonusAmount
field.description: Employee Referral Bonus Amount.

field.name: InternalBonusTracking
field.description: Indicates that the Employee Referral Bonus is enabled.

field.name: InternalQualificationHTML
field.description: The internal qualification of JobInformation (multilingual).

field.name: IsAutoRejectCancelled
field.description: This field indicates if candidates are to be rejected when the requisition is cancel.

field.name: IsAutoRejectFilled
field.description: This field indicates if candidates are to be rejected when the requisition is filled.

field.name: JobBoardDescription
field.description: The Job Board Description of JobInformation (multilingual).

field.name: JobGrade
field.description: The job grade of JobInformation. Standard level of job or job series within the pay structure of an organization.

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: The last modification date of JobInformation.

field.name: LowQuartileSalary
field.description: The low quartile salary of JobInformation. Marketplace comparisons for comparable jobs; usually from salary surveys from HR consulting companies such as Mercer. Added to RS based on contractual obligation to FESCO.

field.name: MidPointSalary
field.description: The mid-point salary of JobInformation. Marketplace comparisons for comparable jobs; usually from salary surveys from HR consulting companies such as Mercer. Added to RS based on contractual obligation to FESCO.

field.name: NumberToHire
field.description: Indicates the number of people to hire.

field.name: OtherCosts
field.description: The others costs of JobInformation.

field.name: RelocationCosts
field.description: The relocation costs of JobInformation.

field.name: SourcingBudget
field.description: The sourcing budget of JobInformation.

field.name: SubmissionValidityPeriod
field.description: Indicates the number of day(s) a submission is valid for the requisition.

field.name: SubmissionValidityPeriodEnabled
field.description: Indicates if the submissions on this requisition must have a validity period. see validityPeriod for the number of day(s) a submission is valid for the requisition

field.name: Title
field.description: The JobInformation title (multilingual).

field.name: TravelCosts
field.description: The travel costs of JobInformation.

field.name: UnlimitedHire
field.description: Indicates if the requisition has an unlimited number of hires.

relation.name: BonusCurrency
relation.description: JobInformation bonus currency.

relation.name: BudgetCurrency
relation.description: JobInformation budget currency.

relation.name: CitizenshipStatus
relation.description: The citizenship status of the JobInformation.

relation.name: ContingentCurrency
relation.description: Link to JobInformation contigent currency rate values.

relation.name: Creator
relation.description: The creator of JobInformation.

relation.name: CSWWorkflow
relation.description: Link to the candidate selection workflow of the requisition.

relation.name: EmploymentEquityEstablishment
relation.description: The employment equity establishement of JobInformation.

relation.name: EmploymentEquityJobCategories
relation.description: The employment equity job category of JobInformation.

relation.name: HireType
relation.description: Link to the hire type of JobInformation .

relation.name: JobField
relation.description: The job field of JobInformation.

relation.name: JobInformationGroup
relation.description: Link to the group of job information.

relation.name: JobLevel
relation.description: Link to the job level of JobInformation .

relation.name: JobRole
relation.description: Link to JobInformation job role value associated to requisition.

relation.name: JobSchedule
relation.description: The schedule of JobInformation.

relation.name: JobShift
relation.description: The job shift of JobInformation.

relation.name: JobType
relation.description: The job type of JobInformation.

relation.name: OfferParameter
relation.description: Link to the requisition offer parameter of JobInformation.

relation.name: Organization
relation.description: The organization of JobInformation.

relation.name: OtherLocations
relation.description: The other lcoations of JobInformation.

relation.name: OvertimeStatus
relation.description: The overtime status of JobInformation.

relation.name: PrescreeningForm
relation.description: The meta prescreening form (same value as the non meta).

relation.name: PrimaryLocation
relation.description: The primary location of JobInformation.

relation.name: Program
relation.description: The education program of JobInformation.

relation.name: RecruiterOwner
relation.description: The recruiter owner of JobInformation.

relation.name: StudyLevel
relation.description: JobInformation education level.

relation.name: WillingnessToTravel
relation.description: JobInformation will travel link.

relation.name: Candidate status prior to selection to regular
ORC Did Labor Assessment Tool Confirm AC
ORC Sourcing AC via Smart Labor

entity.name: JobLevel
entity.description: Job Level lookup values. It determines the available job levels in the system.

entity.name: JobRole
entity.description: A job role is a generic definition of job that applies to all employees - as opposed to a position, which is a specific instance of a job. Actually, a position can be defined as a job role joined to an organization and a location. A job role has a code, name and definition for documentation purposes and also supports the concept of a job profile that specifies the requirements to execute the job.

field.name: CustomerID
field.description: The JobRole internal identifier specified by the customer. Used for referencing a job role identifier known in another external system for integration purposes.

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: Holds the last modification date of the entity.

relation.name: JobField
relation.description: The job field of the job role.

relation.name: JobLevel
relation.description: The job level of the job role.

entity.name: JobSchedule
entity.description: Job Schedule lookup values. It determines the available job schedule types in the system.

entity.name: JobShift
entity.description: Job Shift lookup values. It determines the available job shifts in the system.

entity.name: JobTemplate
entity.description: JobTemplate represents a model for creating requisitions or other templates.

field.name: EffectiveFrom
field.description: The start date for the template.

field.name: EffectiveTill
field.description: The end date for the template.

field.name: JobCode
field.description: The job code (unique identifier) for JobTemplate that can be assigned by clients.

relation.name: BaseJobTemplate
relation.description: Reference to a base job template.

relation.name: Department
relation.description: JobTemplate department link.

relation.name: DepartmentInformation
relation.description: JobTemplate department information.

relation.name: JobInformation
relation.description: Reference to the job information.

relation.name: State
relation.description: Reference to the job template state.

entity.name: JobTemplateState
entity.description: Represents the different states of a job template: active, draft, inactive, deleted.

entity.name: JobType
entity.description: Job Type lookup values. It determines the available job types in the system.

entity.name: Justification
entity.description: Represents the justification for a requisition: new position, replacement, etc.

entity.name: Language
entity.description: This entity represent a language that is supported by our applications.

field.name: Code
field.description: Public identifier of the language.

field.name: ISO
field.description: The ISO code of the language.

entity.name: LinkedInLink
entity.description: This class holds the values for the linkedIn link for a talent user. removeCheckOnCreate=true, removeCheckOnUpdate=true)

field.name: CreationDate
field.description: This field represent the date of the creation of the LinkedIn link.

field.name: Id
field.description: This represent the LinkedIn unique ID.

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: This field reprensents the last time an operation occur on the linkedIn link.

relation.name: LinkedInStatus
relation.description: The linkedin status

entity.name: LinkedInLinkStatus
entity.description: The class represents the status of the LinkedIn link. The status can be one of theses possibles values: Linked, Not Linked, Unlinked.

field.name: Code
field.description: This field hold the unique code value for each LinkedIn status.

entity.name: LocaleCompletionStatus
entity.description: This is the locale completion status. It indicates the completion status of a locale for a given multilingual element.

field.name: Code
field.description: Public identifier of the entity.

entity.name: Location
entity.description: Class that represents a company"s specific location. A company location represents a geographical region. Only locations that are useful to the company are present in this structure. Location is used in the application to define a country; it could also define a State (or province), a region and a city. It usually describes locations where activities happen within the company. As far as country, state and region are concerned, they should be a subset of the reference location structure.

field.name: CustomerID
field.description: The Location internal identifier specified by the customer. Used for referencing a location identifier known in another external system for integration purposes.

field.name: IsWorkerLocation
field.description: Flag variable used in SmartOrg UI. This checkbox is used to check if the field is FusionWorkLocation or not.

field.name: WorkerLocationAddress
field.description: String value used in SmartOrg UI. This field is used to provide the address of Fusionworklocation.

relation.name: NetworkLocation
relation.description: Associated Network Location for this Company Location

entity.name: LocationLevel
entity.description: Company location specific level

entity.name: LocationQuestion
entity.description: This is the association between a company location and a question. This information is pertinent for Prescreening and Disqualification questions. It indicates the pertinence of a question according to associated locations.

field.name: IsInModel
field.description: Indicates if the association between the location and the question is pertinent for a Prescreening Model. This information is applicable only to Prescreening questions.

field.name: IsInProfiler
field.description: Indicates if the association between the location and the question is pertinent for a Candidate Profiler. This information is applicable only to Prescreening questions.

field.name: ModelDisplaySequence
field.description: Indicates the sequence ordering of the question in a Prescreening Model when this question appears to be pertinent according to the associated location.

field.name: ProfilerDisplaySequence
field.description: Indicates the sequence ordering of the question in a Candidate Profiler when this question appears to be pertinent according to the associated location.

relation.name: Location
relation.description: This is the associated company location.

relation.name: Question
relation.description: This is the associated question.

entity.name: LocationSequence
entity.description: Company Location specific sequence

entity.name: Lookup
entity.description: Base entity type for all lookup entities in this model.

entity.name: Meeting
entity.description: The meeting represents an assembly of users (attendees) at a given place at a given time. The meeting contains all the required information for the encounter. A meeting can have one or more MeetingAttendees, each MeetingAttendee links an Attendee to the role (MeetingAttendeeRole) he/she will play during the meeting.

field.name: CandidateFileAttached
field.description: Flag used to determinate if the candidate file is attached (to the email or to the response center).

field.name: Comments
field.description: The comments are provided by the meeting organizer and are useful to give instructions or extra information about the meeting.

field.name: CreationDate
field.description: Date of the meeting creation.

field.name: EndTime
field.description: Date defining when the meeting will end.

field.name: LastUpdate
field.description: Date of the last update.

field.name: Location
field.description: Defines the place where the meeting will occur.

field.name: RequisitionFileAttached
field.description: Flag used to determinate if the requisition file is attached (to the email or to the response center).

field.name: StartTime
field.description: Date defining when the meeting will start.

field.name: Subject
field.description: Defines what the meeting is about.

relation.name: ICalendar
relation.description: Zero or one ICalendar is associated to each meeting.

relation.name: MeetingAttendees
relation.description: The MeetingAttendee is always associated with one Meeting.

relation.name: MeetingReminderDuration
relation.description: A MeetingReminderDuration can be associated with a meeting.

relation.name: MeetingType
relation.description: A MeetingType is associated to each meeting (presently only INTERVIEW is supported).

relation.name: PreselectionApplication
relation.description: A Meeting can be associated or not to a PreselectionApplication.

relation.name: TaleoTimeZone
relation.description: A meeting always refers to one RSTimeZone, eventually this relation is considered when a reminder is sent.

entity.name: MeetingAttendee
entity.description: The MeetingAttendee links the Attendee and the MeetingAttendeeRole; it determines what role the attendee will play during the meeting.

relation.name: Attendee
relation.description: One of three possible types of attendees--CSUserAttendee, UserAttendee, and UnregisteredAttendee--associated with the MeetingAttendee.

relation.name: Meeting
relation.description: The Meeting to which this MeetingAttendee is associated.

relation.name: MeetingAttendeeRole
relation.description: To each MeetingAttendee there is always a MeetingAttendeeRole associated.

entity.name: MeetingAttendeeRole
entity.description: The MeetingAttendeeRole is a multilingual lookup entity that describes the attendee's role at the meeting. Values can be 'organizer,' 'candidate,' etc.

entity.name: MeetingReminderDuration
entity.description: The MeetingReminderDuration is a multilingual lookup entity that defines when the user will be reminded of the meeting.

field.name: MeetingDuration
field.description: The MeetingReminderDuration specifies how many minutes before the meeting the user will be warned.

entity.name: MeetingType
entity.description: The MeetingType is a multilingual lookup entity proposing the type of meeting (currently only INTERVIEW is allowed).

entity.name: Message
entity.description: Log message

field.name: Body
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: PlainText
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: Subject
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: TemplateName
field.description: To be documented.

entity.name: MessageDeliveryTransport
entity.description: email, fax

entity.name: MilitaryService
entity.description: This class represents the details about the military service that the candidate has done or is currently active.

field.name: Branch
field.description: This field holds the branch of military service(navy, air force, etc)

field.name: Country
field.description: This field holds the country where the candidate execute his military service.

field.name: DischargeStatus
field.description: This field holds the dischrge status of the military service.

field.name: DisplaySequence
field.description: This field determines the order to display this military service among the candidate's military services.

field.name: EndDate
field.description: This field holds the end date of the military service..

field.name: RankAchieved
field.description: This field holds the rank achieved in the military service.

field.name: ServiceNumber
field.description: This field holds the service number the candidate is assign to.

field.name: ServiceStatus
field.description: This field holds the service status of the military service.

field.name: StartDate
field.description: This field holds the start date of the military service.

entity.name: NetworkJobField
entity.description: Class that represents network Job Field. This is the list of employment domains, with a hierarchical view.

entity.name: NetworkJobFieldLevel
entity.description: Network JobField specific level

entity.name: NetworkJobFieldSequence
entity.description: Network JobField specific sequence

entity.name: NetworkLocation
entity.description: Class that represents a network-specific location. Taleo locations are a list of locations from around the world. They are usually used to generate the locations of a company, and they are also used in the Career Section to help a candidate select the actual location. They also represent the location used to do a posting, since posting is often done based on a "region" (which is less detailed than the city used in Location). The reference location structure has 3 levels: country, province/state and region.

field.name: ISO3166Alpha3
field.description: ISO3166Alpha3 code of the location

relation.name: CountryLocation
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: RegionLocation
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: StateLocation
relation.description: To be documented.

entity.name: NetworkLocationLevel
entity.description: Network location specific level

entity.name: NetworkLocationSequence
entity.description: Network Location specific sequence

entity.name: NonElectronicMedia
entity.description: Non-Electronic Media are newspapers, magazines, etc. in which requisitions can be posted.

field.name: Address
field.description: This field is the address of the media. It contains the civic number, the street name, the city, the state/province, the zip/postal code and the country.

field.name: CorporateName
field.description: This field is the organization name of the newspaper, broadcast, billboard, magazine, or trade publication.

field.name: IsEnable
field.description: This field indicates if the media is enabled or not.

field.name: PhoneNumber
field.description: This field is the phone number of the media.

relation.name: NonElectronicMediaType
relation.description: This field indicates the type of the non-electronic media. The possible values are 1=Newspapers, 2=Magazines and Trade Publications, 3=Broadcast, 4=Direct Sourcing.

relation.name: RecruitmentSource
relation.description: This field is the related source.

entity.name: NonElectronicMediaType
entity.description: This entity describes the type of Non-Electronic Media. It determines if the non-electronic media is a newspaper, a magazine or another form of non-electronic media.

field.name: Code
field.description: Public identifier of the entity.

entity.name: Offer
entity.description: ArtOffer represents an employment proposition to be eventually communicated to a specific candidate.

field.name: AcceptedDate
field.description: The date the candidate accepted the offer. This happens usually after the extendedDate.

field.name: ActualStartDate
field.description: The date the candidate is supposed to start his/her new job.

field.name: ApprovedDate
field.description: Indicates if the offer has been approved and when.

field.name: ExpirationDate
field.description: Represents the date the offer will cease to be valid.

field.name: ExtendDate
field.description: The date the offer was communicated to the candidate.

field.name: RefusedDate
field.description: The date the candidate refused the offer. This happens usually after the extendedDate.

field.name: Sequence
field.description: The sequence is an incremented value used to generate the offer name. It is also useful for finding the current or last offer. It is a sequence formed by the offers made to the same candidate on the same application.

field.name: SignedOfferLetter
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: Tentative
field.description: A flag indicating if the start date is final or tentative.

relation.name: Application
relation.description: The PreselectionApplication associated with this offer.

relation.name: ApprovalContext
relation.description: The [ApprovalContext] links the Offer to the whole approbation process defined by the [ProcessDefinition].

relation.name: ExtensionMechanism
relation.description: Refrence to the ArtExtensionMechanism, when the offer has been communicated to the candidate this defines the extension mechanism which can be E_MAIL, VERBALLY or LETTER.

relation.name: Status
relation.description: Refence to the ArtOfferStatus, determines the current state of the offer which can be DRAFT, CANCELED, APPROVAL_IN_PROGRESS, APPROVAL_REJECTED, APPROVED, EXTENDED, RESCINDED,IN_NEGOTIATION, REFUSED, ACCEPTED, RENEGED.

relation.name: UserAfterApprovalSuccess
relation.description: User for which an action is requrired when the approbation ends successfully.

entity.name: OfferStatus
entity.description: The ArtOfferStatus represents the possible states of the offer; these are only applicable for an ArtOffer since it is the only one that can evolve. When an ArtOffer is created, the default value is DRAFT. The process starts till a final state, such as REFUSED or ACCEPTED. Many other states are possible.

entity.name: OfferTitle
entity.description: The ArtOfferTitle is a multilingual representation of the different titles that an Offer can have. These titles provide descriptive information. The initial values are "Current Offer," "Offer," "Requisition," "Will Refuse," "Current Job," "Will Accept," "Competitive Offer Terms," "Extended Offer," "Counter Offer," etc.. Please refer to the database for currently used values.

entity.name: OLFCoverageArea
entity.description: Regroupment of Organization(s), Location(s) and JobField(s)

entity.name: Organization
entity.description: Class that represents a company-specific Organization. It describes the divisional structure of the company. This includes, but is not restricted to, company, location, division, area, department and workgroup.

field.name: CustomerID
field.description: The Organization internal identifier specified by the customer. Used for referencing an organization identifier known in another external system for integration purpose

relation.name: Industry
relation.description: Associated Industry for this Organization

entity.name: OrganizationLevel
entity.description: Organization specific level

entity.name: OrganizationSequence
entity.description: Organization specific sequence

entity.name: Origin
entity.description: Object origin entity Determines the origin of an entity.

field.name: Code
field.description: Code of the Object origin entity

entity.name: OtherRecruitmentSource
entity.description: This entity represents a source that is not a job board, an agency, an agent and a non-electronic media. It is one of the others.

relation.name: OtherRecruitmentSourceType
relation.description: Link to the known types of other recruitment sources.

relation.name: RecruitmentSource
relation.description: Link to related recruitment source.

entity.name: OtherRecruitmentSourceType
entity.description: Contains the known types of other recruitment sources.

field.name: Code
field.description: Public identifier of the entity.

entity.name: OvertimeStatus
entity.description: Represents the different overtime statuses (exempt, non exempt).

entity.name: PassportConfiguration
entity.description: Aggregation of Passport partner configurable settings such as partner availability, description, name, etc...

field.name: Description
field.description: Taleo description for provider service.

field.name: Name
field.description: Taleo name for provider service.

field.name: ProviderDescription
field.description: Provider description for service, may be different than Taleo description.

field.name: ProviderName
field.description: Provider name for service, may be different than Taleo name.

field.name: TimeoutDelay
field.description: Time period in hours for a started process instance to expire.

entity.name: PassportConnection
entity.description: Partner credentials and connection information used to access partner system from Taleo product and exchange data.

field.name: Identifier
field.description: Passport connection unique identifier.

field.name: Password
field.description: Passport connection password.

field.name: URI
field.description: End point URI.

field.name: Username
field.description: Passport connection user name.

entity.name: PassportController
entity.description: Provides a way to interact asynchronously with Passport API. Importing this entity does not create an object but an operation to be executed at a later time.

entity.name: PassportFieldMapping
entity.description: Passport partner defined field.

field.name: Mandatory
field.description: True indicates that Passport partner field must contain a value.

field.name: Name
field.description: Passport partner defined field name.

relation.name: Partner
relation.description: Passport partner associated to field.

entity.name: PassportPartner
entity.description: External service provider offering its services to Taleo customers through a Taleo product.

field.name: Version
field.description: Deployed provider service version.

relation.name: CandidateSourcingConfiguration
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: Connections
relation.description: Passport connection associated to partner.

relation.name: ScreeningConfiguration
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: ScreeningType
relation.description: To be documented.

entity.name: PassportPartnerType
entity.description: Passport partner type identifies the partner category. Each Taleo product have a range of supported partner types.

field.name: Code
field.description: Partner type unique identifier.

entity.name: PayFrequencyBasis
entity.description: The entity is used to express the frequency of payment.

field.name: AnnualizationFactor
field.description: A number used to calculate the annual pay.

field.name: CustomerID
field.description: The pay frequency basis internal identifier specified by the customer. Used for referencing a pay frequency basis identifier known in another external system for integration purposes.

field.name: Description
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: Number
field.description: This is the entity key.

entity.name: PhoneType
entity.description: This class is a lookup that display the phone type. i.e Home Phone, Work Phone, etc.

entity.name: PoolAction
entity.description: It indicates the actions that a pool is made for. Example the pool can be for succession planning.

entity.name: PoolType
entity.description: It indicates the type of the pool item that the pool will contains.

entity.name: Position
entity.description: A position is an occurrence of a Job Role. It can also be represented by the chair. Positions are hierarchical. It defines the business employee structure. Typically, the topmost positions are managed by HR team in the system. Other positions can be managed by managers.

field.name: Criticality
field.description: The criticality on a scale of 1 to 5. However, in the current products, only a criticality level of 5 is considered "critical".

field.name: CustomerID
field.description: The JobPosition internal identifier specified by the customer. Used for referencing a job position identifier known in another external system for integration purposes.

field.name: Description
field.description: The description of the position.

field.name: IsOpen
field.description: Flag indicating if the position is open (without an incumbent employee)

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: Holds the last modification date of the entity.

field.name: NbEmployees
field.description: The number of employees for the position

field.name: Number
field.description: The unique internal identifier of this entity.

field.name: TargetStartDate
field.description: The target start date of the position - typically use to manage new positions.

relation.name: Department
relation.description: The department associated to the position.

relation.name: JobRole
relation.description: The job role associated to the position.

relation.name: Location
relation.description: The location associated to the position.

relation.name: Organization
relation.description: The organization associated to the position.

relation.name: ParentPosition
relation.description: The parent position in the position hierarchy.

entity.name: PossibleAnswer
entity.description: This is a possible answer. It is associated to only one question and represents one of the possible answers a candidate can choose from when answering to a question. The format of the question must be single or multiple answer, not text answer.

field.name: Description
field.description: This is the description of this possible answer.

field.name: DisplaySequence
field.description: This is the sequence ordering of this possible answer among all other possible answers of the same question.

field.name: ExplanationNeeded
field.description: Indicates if answer expects an explanation Note this only apply for Disqualification Questions

field.name: NotSpecified
field.description: Indicates if this possible answer is the "not specified" value

relation.name: DisqualifierResult
relation.description: This is the associated disqualifier result for this possible answer. This information is set when the format of the question is disqualification question.

relation.name: Question
relation.description: This is the associated question for this possible answer.

entity.name: PrescreeningForm
entity.description: Represents the collection of questions and skills used for prescreening the candidates

field.name: IgnoreSimpleSkillFormat
field.description: Tell if this form ignores the simple skill format setting to use the detailed format

relation.name: Questions
relation.description: The collection of Question of the Prescreening Form

relation.name: Skills
relation.description: The collection of Skills of the Prescreening Form

entity.name: PrescreeningFormPossibleAnswer
entity.description: A Possible Anwser to a Question linked to a prescreening form

field.name: IsAsset
field.description: Tells if the Answer is a "asset"

field.name: IsRequired
field.description: Tells if the Answer is a "required"

field.name: Weight
field.description: The weight of the answer in %

relation.name: PossibleAnswer
relation.description: The possible Answer

relation.name: PrescreeningFormQuestion
relation.description: The Prescreening Question to which the anwser is linked

entity.name: PrescreeningFormQuestion
entity.description: A Question linked to a prescreening form

field.name: DisplaySequence
field.description: The display sequence of the question in the prescreening form

relation.name: PossibleAnswers
relation.description: The Possible Answers of the Question

relation.name: PrescreeningForm
relation.description: The Prescreening Form to which the skill is linked

relation.name: VisibilityForCandidate
relation.description: This is the visibility for candidates associted with this prescreeningFormQuestion.

entity.name: PrescreeningFormSkill
entity.description: A Skill linked to a prescreening form

field.name: DisplaySequence
field.description: The display sequence of the skill in the prescreening form

field.name: IsAsset
field.description: Tells if the skill is a asset

field.name: IsRequired
field.description: Tells if the skill is a "required"

field.name: Weight
field.description: The weight of the skill in %

relation.name: Experience
relation.description: The exprience level used as a minimum level in the detailed format

relation.name: PrescreeningForm
relation.description: The Prescreening Form to which the skill is linked

relation.name: Proficiency
relation.description: The profiency level used as a minimum level in the detailed format

relation.name: Skill
relation.description: The skill

relation.name: VisibilityForCandidate
relation.description: This is the visibility for candidates associted with this prescreeningFormSkill.

entity.name: PreselectionApplicationResults
entity.description: Contains all the information about the results of the candidate when he/she applied on a requisition. The following information is kept: whether the candidate is an ace, the number of assets the candidate has, the number of required criteria the candidate has, and whether or not the candidate has all the required criteria specified in the requisition he/she applied on.

field.name: HasAllRequired
field.description: Indicates if the candidate has all the required criteria specified in the requisition that he/she applied on.

field.name: IsAceCandidate
field.description: Indicates if the candidate is an ace.

field.name: NbAchievedAssets
field.description: The number of assets that the candidate meets for the requisition he/she applies on.

field.name: NbAchievedRequired
field.description: The number of required criteria that the candidate meets for the requisition he/she applies on.

field.name: Score
field.description: The score the candidate obtained when he/she applied on an application.

relation.name: Application
relation.description: The application for which we have the results.

entity.name: PrivacyStatement
entity.description: This class represents the candidate's privacy statement of the document agreement when he submit a profile or apply on a requisition.

field.name: Agreed
field.description: This field hold the value to inform if a candidate has agree or not to the disclaimer document associated to flow. The disclaimer document can be approve either in a profile flow or requisition specific flow.

entity.name: Profile
entity.description: The profile is the set of information describing the person at a professional and educational level. The profile is not related to any specific job posting.

relation.name: ProfileInformation
relation.description: The ProfileInformation

entity.name: ProfileInformation
entity.description: Application is the centerpiece of the selection process. All actions and events are based and take place on the application. An application is created as soon as a candidate is matched to a requisition, whatever the way (mail application, use of career section, automatic match, reference).

field.name: ApplicationDate
field.description: The date of the last modification of the application.

field.name: BlockCoverage
field.description: The block that the user has completed while entering an application via a career site or the capture resume.

field.name: CandidateNumber
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: Completed
field.description: Indicate if the application is complete or not. An application is consider has completed if the candidate, who applied online, and has reached the end of the application process, or the candidate is matched to a requisition by an operator, or the candidate is capture by an operator via the capture resume, or the candidate is imported via the integration process.

field.name: CompletedDate
field.description: This is the date when the application became completed.

field.name: CreationDate
field.description: The date on which the application has been created.

field.name: ExperienceValidated
field.description: Indicate if the experiences has been validated or not by the candidate.

field.name: IsInternal
field.description: Indicate if the application has been made by an internal employee. True if the employee was an internal one at the moment he applies on the requisition, false otherwise.

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: Holds the last modification date of the entity.

field.name: LastTrackingDate
field.description: This attribute will be made to hold the creation date of the last ApplicationTrackingHistoryItem that was recorded for an application.

field.name: Locale
field.description: Indicates the language in which the person's profile has been filled.

field.name: Number
field.description: The unique internal id of the entity

field.name: RecruitementSourceAutoFilled
field.description: Indicate if recruitement source has been auto detected to filled.

field.name: RecruitmentSourceDetail
field.description: This fields hold the value for the more detail information on a recruitment source. If the user select "Other source" in the drop down value, then we offer to enter the detail about is source that is not available in the drop down list.

field.name: RequestedLocale
field.description: The language of the career site on which the candidate created his application.

field.name: ResumeValidated
field.description: Indicate if the pasted resume has been validated or not by the candidate. See ApplicationText.pastedResume for the business rules that applies.

field.name: SendAcknowledgement
field.description: The date on which an acknowledgement letter has been sent. An acknowledgement letter can be a request more information acknowledgement letter, a capture resume letter acknowledgement letter or a profiler acknowledgement letter.

field.name: StudyValidated
field.description: Indicate if the studies has been validated or not by the candidate.

relation.name: ApplicationCertifications
relation.description: This relation define the certifications related to the application.

relation.name: ApplicationText
relation.description: All the text datas that a candidate can add to his application. For now the candidate can submit his pasted resume, career objectives, cover letter and additional information.

relation.name: AttachedFiles
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: BackgroundCheckConsent
relation.description: This relation represents the information that the candidate has agree during his application.

relation.name: Candidate
relation.description: Link to the candidate associated to the person's profile.

relation.name: ErtAcknowledgementStatus
relation.description: The status of the acknowledgement letter, namely if it were sent or not to the candidate.

relation.name: ErtThankyouStatus
relation.description: The status of the "Thank you" letter, namely if it were sent or not to the candidate.

relation.name: ESignatureDocument
relation.description: This relation define the electronic signature document that the candidate has filled during the application process.

relation.name: Experiences
relation.description: This is the talent user profile list of experiences.

relation.name: HistoryItems
relation.description: The list of history items related to the profile information.

relation.name: InfoFeeder
relation.description: Indicate who has entered the information about the application, the candidate, a referrer, a agent or a recruiter.

relation.name: InitialApplicationMedium
relation.description: Since the application medium attribute in the application can be changed after the application creation by the user, it is not reliable to determine if the candidate was matched or not. The last resort is to check in the tracking history to see if the application was created on Match. We need to add the initialMedium attribute to the application.

relation.name: Medium
relation.description: The medium (online, paper resume, email, etc.) by which the candidate made his profile information.

relation.name: PrivacyStatement
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: PrivacyStatements
relation.description: This relation define the privacy statement document that the candidate agreed during the application process.

relation.name: RecruitmentSource
relation.description: The source (carerr site, a friend, website, newspaper, etc.) by which the candidate heard about the job.

relation.name: RecruitmentSourceEvent
relation.description: The event for which the application is related to.

relation.name: References
relation.description: This relation define the references the candidate will attach to his application or profile.

relation.name: Requests
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: Studies
relation.description: The list of the candidate studies, educations, related to the application.

entity.name: ProgramType
entity.description: This is a lookup class. It contains the possible values that can be given to the type of program for a Study.

entity.name: QCPossibleAnswer
entity.description: This is the generic abstract entity providing the specification of a possible answer. It is associated with only one question and represents one of the possible answers that can be chosen from when answering a question. The format of the question must be single or multiple answer, not text answer.

field.name: Sequence
field.description: This is the sequence of the possible answers for a specific question.

relation.name: Question
relation.description: This is the associated question for this answer

relation.name: QuestionType
relation.description: This is the associated type for this possible answer.

entity.name: QCQuestion
entity.description: This is the generic abstract entity providing the specification of a question. A given question can only be used in one type of question. When the format of the question is not Text Answer, the question comes with a set of possible answers from which the user can choose.

relation.name: QuestionFormat
relation.description: This is the associated format of question for this question.

relation.name: QuestionType
relation.description: This is the associated type for this question.

entity.name: QCQuestionAnswer
entity.description: This is the generic abstract entity providing the specification of an answer to a question. This is the entity a concrete answer must inherit from and define other associations.

field.name: CreationDate
field.description: Indicates when the answer has been provided.

field.name: PerformerKey
field.description: The performer key associated to the answer. It indicates who has entered the answer for the provider. For example, a recruiter may enter an answer for a candidate. The candidate is the provider but the recruiter is the performer.

field.name: PerformerType
field.description: The performer type of the answer. It indicates the type of who has entered the answer for the provider.

field.name: ProviderKey
field.description: The provider key associated to the answer. It indicates who has answered or for whom the answer is provided. For example, a candidate may be the provider of an answer.

field.name: ProviderType
field.description: The provider type of the answer. It indicates the type of who has answered or for whom the answer is provided.

relation.name: Origin
relation.description: This is the origin of the answer. An answer populated by the system after a conversion or an answer directly fed by the end user.

relation.name: Question
relation.description: The question associated to the answer.

relation.name: QuestionType
relation.description: The question type associated to the answer. The type associated to the question and the possible answer must be of the same type for this answer.

entity.name: QCQuestionForm
entity.description: This is the generic abstract entity providing the specification of a question form. A form is a set of questions.

entity.name: Question
entity.description: This is a question. Question can be used for many purposes but a given question is used in only one creno. The TypeOfQuestion indicates the creno (Prescreening, Disqualification, Employment Equity, etc.) When the format of the question is not Text Answer, the question comes with a set of possible answers from which the user can choose from. If it is a disqualification question, each possible answer comes with a disqualifier result. A disqualifer question its format cannot be Text Answer.

field.name: CreationDate
field.description: Indicates the creation date of this question.

field.name: Description
field.description: Indicates the description in all defined languages for this question.

field.name: EmploymentEquityDisplaySequence
field.description: Indicates the sequence ordering of this question. This information is applicable only for employment equity questions.

field.name: ExplanationIntro
field.description: Introduction text to invite candidate to provide explanation when a Disqualification answer need explanation Note this only apply for Disqualification Questions

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: Indicates the last modification date of this question.

field.name: MaxLineAnswer
field.description: Indicates the number of lines of text allowed for this question. this information is applicable only to Text Answer type of questions.

relation.name: DisplayObject
relation.description: This is the associated display option for this question.

relation.name: EEOUSAVersion
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: Format
relation.description: This is the associated format of question for this question.

relation.name: NetworkLocation
relation.description: This is the associated network location for this question. A location is associated only to employment equity questions.

relation.name: PossibleAnswers
relation.description: This is the associated list of possible answers for this question. There are possible answers only to single and multiple answers question.

relation.name: Scope
relation.description: This is the associated scope for this question.

relation.name: TypeOfQuestion
relation.description: This is the associated type of question for this question.

relation.name: VisibilityForCandidate
relation.description: This is the visibility for candidates associted with this question.

entity.name: QuestionAnswer
entity.description: Represents an answer to a question by a given candidate. If the answer has a textual explanation, then there is no possible answer nor disqualifier result associated to it. Otherwise, the answer has a possible answer which coresponds to a choice presented to the candidate. A disqualifier result may be associated when the question is a disqualification question type. The question answer can be provided by the candidate or by any user of the system owning the required privileges.

field.name: CreationDate
field.description: The date at which the answer was given.

field.name: Explanation
field.description: The answer given by the candidate or an operator to a text question.

relation.name: Answer
relation.description: The answer to the question that the candidate or the operator gave.

relation.name: Candidate
relation.description: The candidate to which the answer belong.

relation.name: DisqualifierResult
relation.description: Indicates the behavior result to the system when the candidate provides its answers to disqualification questions.

relation.name: InfoFeeder
relation.description: Indicate who has provided the answer. The candidate himself, a recruiter or an agent.

relation.name: Question
relation.description: The question to which the candidate has answered.

entity.name: QuestionDisplay
entity.description: This is a display option. It defines how answer choice entries will be displayed and entered.

entity.name: QuestionFormat
entity.description: This is the format of Question. It indicates how it can be answered. Possible values are Single Answer, Multiple Answer and Text Answer.

entity.name: QuestionFormType
entity.description: This is the type of question form. It determines the usage of the question form.

entity.name: QuestionScope
entity.description: This is the question scope. It indicates the scope of the question and where it can be used. Possible values are Global, Local and Not Applicable. Global (or Generic) : The question can be managed and used in many contexts globally troughout the application. Questions created in the Precreening Question Library are set Global. Local (or Specific) : The question only exists in a specific area and is not used in any other context. For example, a question can be created and used for a single requisition and cannot be used for any other requisitions. Not Applicable : The question scope has no signification for the given question. It is useless.

entity.name: QuestionType
entity.description: This is the type of question. It determines the usage of the question. Prescreening, Security and EmployementEquity are some exemples.

entity.name: RaterType
entity.description: Rater type lookup values. The rater type determines who has provided the competency answer.

field.name: Code
field.description: The unique code of the rater type.

entity.name: RatingDimension
entity.description: A rating dimension offers a scale of values to select from to evaluate a competency or goal. The rating dimension type determines the usage pattern of this part of the evaluation.

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: Holds the last modification date of the entity.

relation.name: CompetencyProvider
relation.description: The provider of the Rating Dimension

entity.name: RatingDimensionType
entity.description: The rating dimension type determines the usage pattern of this part of the evaluation. The types LEVEL, INTEREST, EXPERIENCE and LAST_USED represent the dimensions also used in the recruiting product and candidate profiles.
