The SCORE dimension is the one mainly used in the Performance Management product for performance reviews.

entity.name: RatingModel
entity.description: A rating model is a set of rating dimensions each representing an aspect of the evaluation. A rating model is used to evaluate a business item, typically a competency but other uses are supported.

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: Holds the last modification date of the entity.

relation.name: CompetencyProvider
relation.description: The provider of the Rating Model

entity.name: RatingValue
entity.description: The rating value is a qualitative and quantitative (numerical) way of describing an evaluation state on a rating dimension scale.

field.name: DisplaySequence
field.description: Defines the order in which to display the rating values (may or may not correspond to the numerical value sequence)

field.name: Name
field.description: The name or display label of the rating value.

field.name: Number
field.description: The internal unique identifier.

field.name: NumericValue
field.description: The numerical value corresponding to this rating value - mandatory as it is used in the aggregation and normalization calculations.

entity.name: Reassignment
entity.description: Reassignment lookup values. It determines the level of readiness for a person in beeing assigned for a different job.

entity.name: RecruitingDocumentFile
entity.description: Represent the document file for the recruiting process.

entity.name: RecruitingPosition
entity.description: Make a link between a JobPosition and a JobTemplate, used in recruiting

relation.name: HiringManager
relation.description: To be documented.

entity.name: RecruitmentSource
entity.description: A Source is a medium or event through which a candidate has heard about the job you are posting or about your company. The candidate may also have applied on a job through different sources. Sources may be as diverse as Internet job boards, job fairs, magazines and specialized trade publications, newspapers, professional associations, mailing lists, recruiting agencies, etc.

field.name: ActiveDescription
field.description: This field indicates if the name is active or not in this language. The base language must be active.

field.name: Description
field.description: This field is the name of the source. Depending of the source type, It represents the name of an Agency or an Agent or a Job board or a Non-Electronic Media or etc... There must be a description in at least the base language.

field.name: DescriptionBaseLocale
field.description: This field indicates which language is the base one for the source name.

field.name: Identifier
field.description: This field is the unique identifier representing the source.

field.name: Number
field.description: The unique internal identifier of this entity.

field.name: PartnerId
field.description: This field indicates to which partner (ex: USAJobs, CareerBuilder, Monster, ...) the RecruitmentSource is linked.

field.name: TableName
field.description: This field indicates in which table the additionnal information ot he source is. The table name depends on the source type.

relation.name: CieJobFields
relation.description: This field represents the list of the job fields related to the source.

relation.name: CieLocations
relation.description: This field represents the list of the locations related to the source.

relation.name: Events
relation.description: This field is the list of the events related to the source.

relation.name: NetworkLocation
relation.description: This field representes the network location associated to the source. The value is set to -1 for all sources except for the non-Electronic Media sources where its origin is system (not user defined).

relation.name: ObjectOrigin
relation.description: Link that indicates wether the object is a system or an user defined object.

relation.name: Organizations
relation.description: This field represents the list of the organizations related to the source.

relation.name: ParentSource
relation.description: This field is the parent of the source. When it is null it means that this source is a parent.

relation.name: State
relation.description: This relation define the state of a recruitment source. The possible state are active or inactive.

relation.name: Type
relation.description: The recruitment source type

relation.name: Visibility
relation.description: This relation define the type of the visibility the recruitment source has. The possible values are Internal or Public.

entity.name: RecruitmentSourceEvent
entity.description: An Event is a specific advertisement in a trade magazine, a recruiting event on a university campus (job fair), or a special recruiting event at your organization.

field.name: Cost
field.description: This field represents the cost of the event.

field.name: Description
field.description: This field is the name of the event.

field.name: EndDate
field.description: This field is the date of the end of the event. When it is null, it means that the event is ongoing.

field.name: ExternalContactEmail
field.description: This field is the email address of the external contact of the event.

field.name: ExternalContactName
field.description: This field is the external contact name of the event.

field.name: ExternalContactPhone
field.description: This field is the phone number of the external contact of the event.

field.name: ID
field.description: This field is theEvent ID. It's an advertisement number that you may find on the job offer in a newspaper, for example. It is NOT the job offer number. An event number may have been given to you while attending a job fair.

field.name: Number
field.description: The unique internal identifier of this entity.

field.name: StartDate
field.description: This field is the date of the beginning of the event.

relation.name: Source
relation.description: This field is the related source.

entity.name: RecruitmentSourceState
entity.description: This Class is a lookup class that define all the recruitment state (active/ inactive) for a recruitment source.

field.name: Code
field.description: The unique identifier of this entity.

entity.name: RecruitmentSourceType
entity.description: This Class is a lookup class that define all the recruitment source type available for a recruitment source.

field.name: CustomDescription
field.description: This field store the custom description associated to a recruitment source type.

entity.name: RecruitmentSourceVisibility
entity.description: This class define the visibility associated with recruitment source.

field.name: Code
field.description: The unique code.

entity.name: Reference
entity.description: Minimal information enabling to identify or reach a person. A reference can be a person a supervisor or boss in the case of work experience.

field.name: Company
field.description: This field hold the value for the company name the reference work.

field.name: DisplaySequence
field.description: This field determines the order to display this reference among the candidate's references.

field.name: EmailAddress
field.description: This field hold the value for the email of the reference.

field.name: Fax
field.description: This field hold the value for the fax number of the reference.

field.name: FirstName
field.description: This field hold the first name of the reference.

field.name: LastName
field.description: This field hold the last name of the reference.

field.name: MiddleInitial
field.description: This field hold the middle Initial of the reference.

field.name: Number
field.description: This entity key

field.name: PhoneNumber
field.description: This field hold the value for the phone number of the reference.

field.name: Relationship
field.description: This field hold the value for the relationship of the reference. I.e Boss, mother, etc.

field.name: Title
field.description: This field hold the value for the job function title of reference

relation.name: Application
relation.description: The application on which the reference is associated.

relation.name: Country
relation.description: This relation defines the country of the reference.

relation.name: ReferenceType
relation.description: This relation define the type of relation the reference is associated.

relation.name: RelationshipLength
relation.description: This relation define the length of relationship that the candidate has with the reference is entered.

entity.name: ReferenceType
entity.description: This class define the type of reference the candidate can have. i.e Personal, Occupational, etc

entity.name: ReferralStatus
entity.description: This class define the possible referral status a candidate can have according the referral process.

field.name: Code
field.description: Use as unique ID for the sourcing values.

entity.name: RelationshipLength
entity.description: This class is use to define the default values use to fill the field length of relationship in the reference class.

entity.name: RequestMoreInfoState
entity.description: This class contains all the states for the "Request More Info" letter.

entity.name: RequiredLanguages
entity.description: Indicates which languages are required to be filled for a user defined selection. This value can be one of: both content and webtop languages, or webtop languages only.

field.name: Code
field.description: Public identifier of the required languages.

entity.name: Requisition
entity.description: Represents a requisition.

field.name: AbstractInfo
field.description: Abstract information of the requisition.

field.name: AceCandidateAlertChoice
field.description: The configuration of choice for Ace Candidate Alerts.

field.name: AceCandidateAlertEnabled
field.description: Indicates if the Ace Candidate Alert is enabled.

field.name: AceCandidateMinimalScore
field.description: The minimal score for the Ace Candidate Alert.

field.name: AceCandidateNumberRelevant
field.description: The number of relevant assets for the Ace Candidate Alert.

field.name: ClosingDateExternal
field.description: The external closing date of the requisition.

field.name: ClosingDateInternal
field.description: The internal closing date of the requisition.

field.name: ContestNumber
field.description: The requisition number.

field.name: DailyRecruitingReportEnabled
field.description: Indicates if the daily recruiting report is enabled.

field.name: DescriptionBaseLocale
field.description: The base locale for the requisition description.

field.name: ExtendMoreOffers
field.description: This field indicates if it is allowed to make more offers than positions available for this requisition.

field.name: HasBeenApproved
field.description: Indicates if the requisition has been approved.

field.name: HotJob
field.description: Indicates if the requisition is posted as "urgent need."

field.name: ManagerRequisitionTitle
field.description: The title of the requisition provided by the manager.

field.name: MixedPostedJobState
field.description: Calculated field indicating the most relevant posted job status for the requisition. The status can be Scheduled, Posted, Unposted or Expired.

field.name: Number
field.description: This is the entity key

field.name: OpeningDateExternal
field.description: The external opening date of the requisition.

field.name: OpeningDateInternal
field.description: The internal opening date of the requisition.

field.name: PositionString
field.description: The position of the requisition (used if Position is not enabled in the application).

field.name: PreventPosting
field.description: This is a new Requisition field that is related to, but separate from, Status and Status Detail. "Do Not Post" is a value that can be selected to stop a Requisition from being posted. The flag may be set and will persist through Draft, Pending, Open (pre-posting) and On-Hold statuses. It is a separate data field.

field.name: RequestMoreInfo
field.description: Determines the logical operator between the asset and the score for "request more info."

field.name: RequestMoreInfoAssetValue
field.description: Indicates the value of the asset criteria for "request more info."

field.name: RequestMoreInfoByAssetEnabled
field.description: Indicates if the by asset criteria is enabled for "request more info."

field.name: RequestMoreInfoByScoreEnabled
field.description: Indicates if the by score criteria is enabled for "request more info."

field.name: RequestMoreInfoScoreValue
field.description: Indicates the score criteria value for "request more info."

field.name: TargetStartDate
field.description: The target start date of the requisition.

relation.name: AceCandidateAlertRecipients
relation.description: The recipients for the Ace Candidate Alert.

relation.name: AttachedFiles
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: Collaborators
relation.description: The collaborators for the requisitions.

relation.name: CompletionLevel
relation.description: Link to the completion level of the requisition.

relation.name: ContactEmailExternal
relation.description: The external contact email of the requisition.

relation.name: ContactEmailInternal
relation.description: The internal contact email of the requisition.

relation.name: ContactNameExternal
relation.description: The external contact name of the requisition.

relation.name: ContactNameInternal
relation.description: The internal contact name of the requisition.

relation.name: Department
relation.description: Link to the department of the requisition.

relation.name: DepartmentInformation
relation.description: Link to the department information related to the requisition.

relation.name: HiringManager
relation.description: The hiring manager for the requisition.

relation.name: HiringManagerAssistant
relation.description: The hiring manager assistant for the requisition.

relation.name: HRMS
relation.description: Link to the origin of the requisition (from Taleo or imported).

relation.name: JobInformation
relation.description: Link to the job information of the requisition.

relation.name: Justification
relation.description: The justification for the requisition.

relation.name: Position
relation.description: Link to the position of the requisition.

relation.name: RecruiterAssistant
relation.description: The recruiter assistant for the requisition.

relation.name: RecruitingReportRecipients
relation.description: The recipients of the daily recruiting report.

relation.name: RequisitionEvent
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: ResumeState
relation.description: The resume state of the requisition (used when we reactivate a requisition that is "on hold").

relation.name: State
relation.description: The requisition state of the requisition.

entity.name: RequisitionEvent
entity.description: The History Event is the main piece of information of the history. A History Event represents an occurrence of an event type. The list of the History Events constitutes the System History.

field.name: Comments
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: EventDate
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: WorkActionNumber
field.description: To be documented.

relation.name: Operator
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: SubstituteOperator
relation.description: To be documented.

entity.name: RequisitionHistory
entity.description: Represents an element of the history of a requisition.

field.name: CreationDate
field.description: The creation date of the Requisition History.

field.name: EndDate
field.description: The date the status (Draft, Save as Open, etc.) was last changed..

relation.name: Creator
relation.description: The user who created the Requisition History.

relation.name: RecruiterOwner
relation.description: The recruiter for the Requisition History.

relation.name: Requisition
relation.description: Reference of the requisition to which the Requisition History refers.

entity.name: RequisitionListOpti
entity.description: Contains each owner of a requisition and the role he played

field.name: OperatorType
field.description: Indicates the Role played from the user for this requisition 1 = recruiter owner of the requisition 2 = hiring manager of the requisition 3= recruiter assistant of the requisition 4= hiring manager assistant of the requisition

relation.name: JobInformation
relation.description: Link to the role of the user for the requisition

relation.name: Operator
relation.description: Reference to the operator

entity.name: RequisitionOfferParameter
entity.description: The ArtRequisitionOfferParameter represents a meta-entity encapsulating the offer parameters and behavior of the Offer aspects for a Requisition.

field.name: MaximumSalary
field.description: The ArtRequisitionOfferParameter represents a meta-entity encapsulating the offer parameters and behavior of the Offer aspects of a Requisition.

field.name: MaximumSalaryReference
field.description: An attribute that calculates the maximum annual salary in the reference currency (USD).

entity.name: RequisitionParentState
entity.description: The general status (more of a global state) of the requisition.

entity.name: RequisitionScreeningPartner
entity.description: Defines the activation of a given partner on a given requisition. Use its BaseAdminEntity.status to manage activation. One instance of this class per Partner, per Requisition.

entity.name: RequisitionState
entity.description: The detailed status (a more specific state) of the requisition.

relation.name: ParentState
relation.description: Reference to the general status of the requisition state.

entity.name: ResourceLookup
entity.description: Base entity type for all resource based lookup entities in this model.

field.name: Description
field.description: Textual representation of the entity.

field.name: Number
field.description: The physical key of the entity.

field.name: ResourceNumber
field.description: The physical identifier for this resource lookup.

entity.name: Role
entity.description: A role in an application

field.name: Description
field.description: The multilingual description of a role

field.name: Name
field.description: The name of a role

entity.name: RoleAssignment
entity.description: The regional assigne represent a user map on a userdefined role.

entity.name: Salary
entity.description: This lookup entity represents the list of possible salary ranges from which the candidate can choose.

entity.name: SchedulerTaskType
entity.description: This class is not used in 8.0, it's only needed for backward compatibility with 7.5 (needed for the integration)

relation.name: Requisition
relation.description: To be documented.

entity.name: ShiftAvailability
entity.description: This class represents the availability of the candidate for different days and periods. For each pair of day-period we have a flag that reflect is availability.

field.name: Day1Period1
field.description: Represent the availability of the candidate for the day of the week #1 and the period of the day #1.

field.name: Day1Period2
field.description: Represent the availability of the candidate for the day of the week #1 and the period of the day #2.

field.name: Day1Period3
field.description: Represent the availability of the candidate for the day of the week #1 and the period of the day #3.

field.name: Day1Period4

field.name: Day3Period2

field.name: Day5Period5

field.name: Day6Period1

field.name: Day6Period2

entity.name: Skill
entity.description: This is a skill. A skill is defined in the system by Taleo. A client has the ability to build its own list of skills based on all skills provided by Taleo. Taleo skills are linked to network job fields and are not editable by the client. The visibility for candidates is editable by the client.

relation.name: Competency
relation.description: The competency corresponding to this skill.

relation.name: VisibilityForCandidate
relation.description: This is the associated visibility for candidate for this skill.

entity.name: SourcingRequest
entity.description: This entity represents a requisition posted on a specific job board for a determined period of time.

field.name: ApplyOnlineEnabled
field.description: This field indicates if the Apply Online button is to be displayed in the Career Section. The option is set at posting. Default value set to true when the associated CareerSite has a job specific application flow.

field.name: CloseDate
field.description: This field represents the end of the requisition availability on the job board. When null, the posting is always available on the job board (ongoing).

field.name: CreationDate
field.description: This field is the date when the posting was done by the user. tt is updated each time the status changes.

field.name: OpenDate
field.description: This field represents the date when the requisition is available on the job board.

relation.name: Requisition
relation.description: Link to the requisition related to the soucing request.

relation.name: SourcingRequestStatus
relation.description: This field represents the status of the posting. Possible values are: 1=scheduled, 2=posted, 3=unposted, 4=expired.

entity.name: SourcingRequestAgent
entity.description: This entity represents a requisition posted for a period of time for which an agency portal and a specific agent are invited to refer candidates.

field.name: CloseDate
field.description: This field represents the end of the requisition availability on the agency portal. When null, the posting is available on the agency portal (ongoing).

field.name: OpenDate
field.description: This field represents the date when the requisition is available on the agency portal.

field.name: SearchRelevancy
field.description: Attribute required for the search feature.

relation.name: Agent
relation.description: Link to the agent who was invited to refer a candidate for the requisition.

relation.name: Requisition
relation.description: Link to the requisition related to the posting.

relation.name: SourcingRequestStatus
relation.description: This field indicates the posting status of the requisition on the agency portal. Possible values are: 1=scheduled, 2=posted, 3=unposted or 4=expired, 6=error, 20=new.

entity.name: SourcingRequestHistory
entity.description: This entity represents the history of a requisition posted on a specific job board. Each time the posted job status changes, an entity is created with the last posted job status.

field.name: CloseDate
field.description: The date the posting requisition becomes unavailable on the job board. When null, the requisition is always available (ongoing).

field.name: CreationDate
field.description: The date the posting status changed.

field.name: OpenDate
field.description: The date the posting requisition becomes available on the job board.

relation.name: JobBoard
relation.description: Link to the job board where the requisition was posted at a specific moment.

relation.name: Requisition
relation.description: Link to the requisition related to the posting.

relation.name: SourcingRequestStatus
relation.description: Indicates the posting status of the requisition on the job board at a specific moment. Possible values are: 1=scheduled, 2=posted, 3=unposted or 4=expired.

entity.name: SourcingRequestStatus
entity.description: This entity indicates the status of a posted job. A requisition can, for instance be posted, be unposted, or be expired on a job board.

entity.name: StartDate
entity.description: This is a lookup class. It contains the possible values that can be given by a cadidate or an operator for the advanced notice that the candidate must give to is current employer.

entity.name: Status
entity.description: This class define the possible referral status a candidate can have according the referral process.

entity.name: Step
entity.description: This entity represents one of the workflow elements. When all the elements are completed, the workflow is considered completed. The steps are built based on an StepDefinition. The steps can be processed by Users or Systems and can have specializations and also different durations.

entity.name: StepApplicationDefinition
entity.description: The StepApplicationDefinition represents a specialization of the StepDefiniton; StepTaskDefinition is the only specialization of the StepApplicationDefinition.

entity.name: StepDefinition
entity.description: The step definition is the super interface of all definitions. The step definition only specifies the incoming transitions, the outgoing ones and the process to which the step is linked. All other possible attributes for a step are delegated to the specializations.

field.name: ExecutionSequence
field.description: ExecutionSequence is arbitrary index (nullable) not used directly by the workflow engine. Two or more activities definition can have the same executionSequence inside one process definition. Application can set this sequence in order to have logical suite of activities (approval path use this sequence).

field.name: Name
field.description: Name identifying the step definition.

field.name: Number
field.description: The physical key of the entity.

entity.name: StepTaskDefinition
entity.description: The step task definition represents the definition of which task will be executed when the StepTask will be reached.

relation.name: TaskApproval
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: TaskPerformer
relation.description: To be documented.

entity.name: StructureLevel
entity.description: Generic entity to provide specification of the different levels of any tree structure

field.name: Code
field.description: Unique identifier allowing providing a meaningful key

field.name: Level
field.description: Refers to the level of depth in the tree structure. First visible level will be 1 and root is considered as being at level 0 (not visible)

field.name: Name
field.description: Name of the level (multilingual)

field.name: Visible
field.description: Indicates whether the level is visible or not

relation.name: Status
relation.description: Reference to the Administration Entity Status of the structure level.

entity.name: Study
entity.description: This entity represents a part of candidate's resume. It describes one of his/her educational degree and history. (removeCheckOnCreate=true,removeCheckOnRead=true, removeCheckOnUpdate=true, removeCheckOnDelete=true)

field.name: DisplaySequence
field.description: This field determines the order to display this study among the candidate's studies. It's also a part of the key (Candidate, Requisition, PorfileLangange, displaySequence) identifying a specific candidate's study for a specific application and for a specific profile language.

field.name: Gpa
field.description: This field (Grade Point Average) is a number that represents the average of a student's grades during his or her time at an institution. Usually it is weighted by number of credits given for the course.

field.name: GpaRange
field.description: This field is the maximum grade value at the institution.

field.name: Graduated
field.description: This field holds the value if the candidate graduate from high school or receive a GED (General Education Development)

field.name: GraduationDate
field.description: This field is the date when the candidate has received his academic degree.

field.name: GraduationDateProjected
field.description: This field holds the value to identify if the graduated date is a projected date.

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: The last modification date of the entity

field.name: NameWhileAttending
field.description: This fields hold the value for the name use by the candidate when attending at the time of education.

field.name: Number
field.description: The unique internal identifier of this entity.

field.name: OtherCourseTitle
field.description: This field is used when the candidate's program is not listed in the programs list. It contains the candidate's program name.

field.name: OtherInstitutionCity
field.description: This field holds the value for the other location city if the institution list doesn't contains the value the candidate need.

field.name: OtherInstitutionName
field.description: This field is used when the candidate's institution is not listed in the institutions list. It contains the candidate's institution name.

field.name: StartDate
field.description: This field contains the date of the beginning of the candidate's program.

relation.name: Application
relation.description: This field represents the application related to the candidate's study.

relation.name: Institution
relation.description: This field represents the institution where the candidate studied.

relation.name: OtherInstitutionLocation
relation.description: This relation define the location for the other institution if not available in the selector.

relation.name: Program
relation.description: This field represents the program related to the candidate's study.

relation.name: ProgramType
relation.description: Contains the type of the program : General, Major or Minor.

relation.name: StudyLevel
relation.description: This field represents the education level related to the study. For example: High school diploma.

entity.name: StudyLevel
entity.description: Study Level lookup values. It determines the education levels a person has or intends to reach.

entity.name: SubCompetency
entity.description: A sub-competency is a constituent element of a competency. It describes a competency with more granularity.

relation.name: CompetencyProvider
relation.description: The provider of the SubCompetency

entity.name: TalentCompetency
entity.description: The talent competency determines the set of answers provided for a competency. A competency can be rated on many dimensions.

field.name: AssessedSSA
field.description: Indicates if the answer has been provided in a simple or detailed manner.

relation.name: AssessmentRating
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: Competency
relation.description: The competency associated to the talent competency.

relation.name: EmployeePerformanceRating
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: ExperienceRating
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: InterestRating
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: LastUsedRating
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: ManagerPerformanceRating
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: ProficiencyRating
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: TalentUser
relation.description: Link to the the talent user.

entity.name: TalentCompetencyValue
entity.description: The talent competency value represents one answer provided for a competency.

relation.name: RatedDimension
relation.description: The rating dimension associated to the talent competency value. It indicates which dimension of the competency is rated.

relation.name: RatedValue
relation.description: The rating value associated to the talent competency value. It indicates the rating value provided for the rated dimension.

relation.name: RaterType
relation.description: The rater type associated to the talent competency value.

relation.name: TalentCompetency
relation.description: The talent competency associated to the talent competency value.

entity.name: TalentUser
entity.description: The talent user is the common person information layer. A person can be a candidate, an employee, a contact, or any combination of these types. The talent user also contains a part of the person's profile and job preferences. Remaining part of the profile is found via the profile relationship. removeCheckOnCreate=true)

field.name: CustomerID
field.description: TalentUser internal identifier specified by the customer. Used for referencing the talentUser identifier known in another external system for integration purposes.

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: Holds the last modification date of the entity.

field.name: Number
field.description: The unique internal identifier of this entity.

field.name: YearsInIndustry
field.description: Number of years in the current industry field.

field.name: YearsOfManagementExperience
field.description: Number of years of management experience.

relation.name: ArUser
relation.description: Link to the user associated to the TalentUser). The user entity provides common information and access to the products via the user accounts.

relation.name: EmploymentStatus
relation.description: The desired employee statuses associated to the person.

relation.name: InterestInInternationalAssignment
relation.description: The level of interest associated to the person in being relocated internationally.

relation.name: JobFields
relation.description: The desired or preferred job fields associated to the person.

relation.name: JobLevels
relation.description: The desired job levels associated to the person.

relation.name: JobSchedules
relation.description: The desired job schedules associated to the person.

relation.name: JobTypes
relation.description: The desired job types associated to the person.

relation.name: LinkedInLink
relation.description: This relation represent the link between the talent user profile and the LinkedInLink entity.

relation.name: Locations
relation.description: The desired or preferred locations associated to the person.

relation.name: Organizations
relation.description: The desired or preferred organizations associated to the person.

relation.name: Preferences
relation.description: The talent user preferences associated to the person.

relation.name: Profile
relation.description: To be documented.

relation.name: Reassignment
relation.description: The level of readiness associated to the person in beeing reassigned.

relation.name: StudyLevels
relation.description: The desired study levels associated to the person.

relation.name: TalentCompetencies
relation.description: Link to the the talent user rated competencies. It contains all the competency answers provided by the person itself or by another person.

relation.name: WillingnessToTravel
relation.description: The desired travel options associated to the person.

relation.name: WillRelocate
relation.description: The level of interest associated to the person in being relocated.

entity.name: TalentUserPreferences
entity.description: Represents the preferences that the candidate can configure from the Career Site. The candidate selects the values that fit him best and save them in the database via this entity. These preferences are later checked by the process that must take them into account. For example, the "sendApplicationAknowledgement" attribute must be checked to determine if the related corresponding must be sent to a candidate.

field.name: CareerSiteLanguage
field.description: Contains the language in which the Career Site must be displayed to the candidate or agent.

field.name: CorrespondenceLanguage
field.description: Contains the language in which the correspondence must be sent to the candidate or agent. When no value is selected, the language of the last general application is used instead.

field.name: DoNotEmail
field.description: Indicate the the TalentUser does not want to receive any email.

field.name: LastReferralListAccessDate
field.description: Last referral list access date

field.name: LastSubmissionListAccessDate
field.description: Last submission list access date

field.name: PreferredTimeZone
field.description: Contains the time zone selected by the candidate or agent. If the candidate or agent did not select a time zone, the system will use the time zone corresponding to the candidate's residence. If the residence has not been provided by the candidate, the system will take the time zone of the browser. Finally, if no time zone can deducted from the request, the default time zone (company setting) will be taken into account.

field.name: SendApplicationAcknowledgement
field.description: Determines if the Acknowledgement Letter must be sent to the candidate or not.

field.name: SendJobPostingNotification
field.description: Determines if the Job Posting Notification must be sent to the candidate or not. If yes, it takes the value of attribute "jobPostingNoticeFrequency" into account.

field.name: SendMyJobAgentsNotice
field.description: Determines if the Job Agent Notification(s) must be sent to the candidate or not. If yes, it takes the value of attribute "jobPostingNoticeFrequency" into account, unless it has been explicitly overridden in the job agent itself.

field.name: SendRejectionLetterNotice
field.description: Determines if the Rejection Letter (sent when a requisition is filled or canceled) must be sent to a candidate.

entity.name: TaleoTimeZone
entity.description: Timezone accordingly to the meridian you are living

field.name: Number
field.description: Unique identifier generated by system

field.name: TimezoneId
field.description: Identification of the timezone

entity.name: TypeOfInstitution
entity.description: This entity is a lookup representing the list of possible type of institution: for example: University, College, school, etc,,,

field.name: Code
field.description: The public identifier of the type of institution.

entity.name: TypeOfQuestion
entity.description: This is the type of question. It indicates the purpose of the question, what it is used for. Possible values can be For Prescreening, For Employment Equity, For Disqualification, etc, as configured in the system.

entity.name: UDFDefinition
entity.description: This entity contains the definition of a user-defined field.

field.name: Cardinality
field.description: Indicates how many values a given UDF can contain. This field only applies to UDFs of the selection and lookup types.

field.name: Description
field.description: A textual description of the user-defined field. This description can be completed in one or more languages.

field.name: Entity
field.description: Indicates which metaclass this user-defined field is defined on. For example, CSUser, Requisition, Offer are entities that support UDFs.

field.name: ID
field.description: An alphanumeric identifier that is unique across all user-defined field definitions.

field.name: Lookup
field.description: Links the UDF of the lookup type to its lookup entity. The lookup entity provides the selection of values presented to the user.

relation.name: OwnedUDS
relation.description: For user-defined fields of type "Selection", this relation indicates that the UDF uses a private selection. As such, the values of that selection can only be used by this UDF.

relation.name: Type
relation.description: Indicates the type of user-defined field for this UDF definition.

relation.name: UDS
relation.description: For user-defined fields of type "Selection," this relation indicates that the UDF uses a shared selection. A shared selection exists independently of the UDFs that use it, and can be used by multiple UDFs.

entity.name: UDFType
entity.description: Defines the possible types of User Defined Fields.

field.name: Number
field.description: The unique identifier of the UDF type.

entity.name: UDSElement
entity.description: The UDSElement entity models user-defined selection elements. A selection element is a possible value of the selection (discrete value). A selection element may then be used as a UDF (user-defined field) value.

field.name: Active
field.description: Indicates if this selection element is active. An inactive element will normally be hidden in the user interface.

field.name: Code
field.description: An alphanumeric code that uniquely identifies the element.

field.name: Complete
field.description: Indicates if the selection element has all the required information entered. The required information is the description for all content languages. An incomplete element should not be shown in the UI.

field.name: CustomerID
field.description: The UDSElement internal identifier specified by the customer. Used for referencing a UDSElement identifier known in another external system for integration purposes.

field.name: Description
field.description: The descriptive name of the selection element.

field.name: EffectiveFrom
field.description: The date from element takes effect, if any. The effectiveFrom and effectiveTill fields are considered by the system only if their parent selection enables effective dates.

field.name: EffectiveUntil
field.description: The date the element becomes inactive, if any.

field.name: LastModifiedDate
field.description: The last modification date of the UDSElement

field.name: Number
field.description: The unique identifier of this entity.

field.name: Sequence
field.description: The default display sequence of the element.

relation.name: JobFields
relation.description: JobFields for which this selection element is active.

relation.name: Locations
relation.description: Locations for which this selection element is active.

relation.name: Organizations
relation.description: Organizations for which this selection element is active.

relation.name: UserDefinedSelection
relation.description: Indicates in which selection this element belongs. That selection's attributes influence how an element is to be used and displayed in the user interface.

entity.name: UnregisteredAttendee
entity.description: The UnregisteredAttendee represents the attendee who is unknown to the system. It is the opposite of UserAttendee. The only available information about the attendee is his/her email address.

field.name: UnregisteredAttendeeEmail
field.description: The email address of the unregistered attendee.

entity.name: User
entity.description: The user is the entity that defines a system user with his information

field.name: City
field.description: User's city

field.name: CompensationEmployeeId
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: CompensationSystemId
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: CorporateEmail
field.description: User's corporate email address

field.name: CorrespondenceEmail
field.description: User's correspondence email address

field.name: Country
field.description: User's country

field.name: DepartmentName
field.description: User's department name

field.name: DepartmentNumber
field.description: User's department number

field.name: EmployeeID
field.description: User's Employee ID

field.name: Fax
field.description: User's fax number

field.name: FirstName
field.description: User's first name

field.name: HomePhone
field.description: User's home phone number

field.name: Initial
field.description: User's initial

field.name: LastName
field.description: User's last name

field.name: MobilePhone
field.description: User's mobile phone number

field.name: Pager
field.description: User's pager number

field.name: PersonalEmail
field.description: User's personal email address

field.name: Prefix
field.description: User's prefix

field.name: State
field.description: User's state

field.name: StreetAddress
field.description: User's street address line 1

field.name: StreetAddress2
field.description: User's street address line 2

field.name: StreetAddress3
field.description: User's street address line 3

field.name: Suffix
field.description: User's suffix

field.name: SystemUser
field.description: Flags that tells if this user is a system user or a standard user

field.name: Title
field.description: User's title

field.name: WorkPhone
field.description: User's work phone number

field.name: WorkphoneExtension
field.description: User's work phone number extension

field.name: Zipcode
field.description: User's zipcode

relation.name: UserAccount
relation.description: To be documented.

entity.name: UserAccount
entity.description: The userAccount is the authentication entity that defines a system user

field.name: AccountCreationDate
field.description: Account creation date

field.name: AccountEndValidity
field.description: The account validity end date

field.name: AccountStartValidity
field.description: The account validity start date

field.name: ForceChangePassword
field.description: Indicates whether the user must change his or her password at next login.

field.name: LastPasswordModification
field.description: Last date when the user changed his or her password.

field.name: Loginname
field.description: The user's login name

relation.name: Groups
relation.description: User accounts that belongs to this group

entity.name: UserAttendee
entity.description: The UserAttendee is a meeting attendee who is known by the system. For example, the meeting organizer is a UserAttendee.

relation.name: User
relation.description: The user attendee always refers to a known system user.

entity.name: UserDefinedSelection
entity.description: The UserDefinedSelection entity models user-defined selections. A selection (domain of discrete values) may then be used to define user-defined fields.

field.name: Code
field.description: Alphanumeric code that uniquely identifies the selection.

field.name: CustomerID
field.description: The UserDefinedSelection internal identifier specified by the customer. Used for referencing a UserDefinedSelection identifier known in another external system for integration purposes.

field.name: EffectiveDatingEnabled
field.description: Indicates if the elements of this selection can specify an activation period. If this field is set to false, any dates in the 'effectiveFrom' and 'effectiveTill' fields of the elements will not be considered.

field.name: Large
field.description: Indicates that this selection handles a large amount of elements.

field.name: Name
field.description: Descriptive name of the selection.

field.name: Number
field.description: The unique identifier of this entity.

field.name: OLFLinkingMandatory
field.description: Indicates if all elements of this selection must be linked to at least one structure element.

field.name: OLFMetaClass
field.description: The meta-class of one of the following: Organization, Location, JobField. Elements linked to this selection must only be linked to that type of structure.

relation.name: Elements
relation.description: Contains the elements of this selection.

relation.name: Origin
relation.description: Indicates the origin of this selection (either built in by Taleo, or company-specific data).

relation.name: RequiredLanguages
relation.description: Indicates which languages are required to make this user-defined selection complete.

relation.name: UDFDefinition
relation.description: To be documented.

entity.name: UserType
entity.description: User Roles are sets of Functional Permissions that can be attributed to Users.

entity.name: VacationType
entity.description: The ArtVactionType is a multilingual lookup entity representing the different possible vacation units: weeks, days, percent.

entity.name: ValidityPeriodType
entity.description: Lookup values for request validity period type. Always valid never expires. User defined expires after the number of days specified by the user. Partner defined ignores validity expiration date and expires after partner defined validity period for request.

entity.name: VisibilityForCandidate
entity.description: This is the visibility for candidates. It indicates the availability of the associated element for internal candidates, external candidates, or for all candidates.

entity.name: WillingnessToTravel
entity.description: Will Travel lookup values. It determines the person's likeliness to travel.

field.name: Value
field.description: This a value associated to a WillTravel record used for computation.

entity.name: WillRelocate
entity.description: Will Relocate lookup values. It determines the level of interest for a person in beeing relocated.

field.name: Code
field.description: The unique code of this enumeration value.

entity.name: WorkAction
entity.description: Available task to process (work action) .

field.name: AutoComment
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: Name
field.description: To be documented.

field.name: TrackingDesc
field.description: To be documented.

entity.name: WorkCondition
entity.description: This class represents the work conditions in the houlry world of the candidate. ( Job Shift class is similar in the professional world)

field.name: AvailableHolidays
field.description: The field set if the candidate is willing to work on holidays.

field.name: AvailableWeekends
field.description: The field set if the candidate is willing to work on weekends.

field.name: HourlyPayRateExpected
field.description: The field set the amount of money expected based on a hourly pay rate.

relation.name: HourlyPayRateCurrency
relation.description: This relation define the pay rate currency for the current workconditions.

relation.name: HoursPerWeekPreferred
relation.description: The field set the number of hours the candidate prefered to work per week. The possible values are defined in the WorkConditionHourLevel class.

relation.name: HoursPerWeekWilling
relation.description: The field set the number of hours the candidate is willing to work per week. The possible values are defined in the WorkConditionHourLevel class.

entity.name: WorkConditionHourLevel
entity.description: This class is a lookup to display the value of the following fields. - WorkingCondition - hoursPerWeekWilling - WorkingCondition - hoursPerWeekPreferred

entity.name: WorkerBusinessUnit
entity.description: The entity represents a business unit.

field.name: CustomerID
field.description: The business unit internal identifier specified by the customer. Used for referencing a business unit identifier known in another external system for integration purposes.

field.name: Name
field.description: Multi lingual string representing the name of a business unit.

field.name: Number
field.description: This is the entity key.

entity.name: WorkerGrade
entity.description: The entity represents the level or rank of an employee.

field.name: CustomerID
field.description: The grade internal identifier specified by the customer. Used for referencing a grade identifier known in another external system for integration purposes.

field.name: Number
field.description: This is the entity key.

field.name: SetCode
field.description: A string specifying the set code.

entity.name: WorkerJob
entity.description: The entity represents the role of an employee.

field.name: CustomerID
field.description: The job internal identifier specified by the customer. Used for referencing a job identifier known in another external system for integration purposes.

field.name: Number
field.description: This is the entity key.

field.name: SetCode
field.description: A string specifying the set code.

entity.name: WorkerLegalEmployer
entity.description: The entity represents a legal employer.

field.name: CustomerID
field.description: The legal employer internal identifier specified by the customer. Used for referencing a legal employer identifier known in another external system for integration purposes.

field.name: LegislationCode
field.description: A string specifying the legislation code.

field.name: Name
field.description: Multi lingual string representing the name of legal employer.

field.name: Number
field.description: This is the entity key.

entity.name: WorkerType
entity.description: This class is use in the contingent world and define a US income tax distinction as to how the contractor is paid.

entity.name: WorkItem
entity.description: A work item represents a task that is assigned to a user of the Taleo system.

field.name: Comment
field.description: A comment entered by the user who created the work item.

field.name: CreationDate
field.description: The date and time the work item was created.

relation.name: Assignee
relation.description: The user to whom this workitem is assigned.

relation.name: Originator
relation.description: The user who created the workitem.

relation.name: ResumeState
relation.description: The state of the work item before being put on hold.

relation.name: State
relation.description: The current state of the work item.

relation.name: Type
relation.description: The type of work item.

entity.name: WorkItemCategory
entity.description: Defines categories in which work items can be classified. Currently two categories exist: Assignable and Automatic.

entity.name: WorkItemState
entity.description: Defines states in which a work item can be. There are currently two possible states. Active, which indicates that the workitem is ready to be read and realized. This is the initial status. The second state is On Hold, which suspends a work item. For example, when a requisition is put on hold, all its related workitems are automatically put on hold. They are resumed as soon as the requisition is resumed.

entity.name: WorkItemType
entity.description: Defines the kinds of work items that exist in the Taleo system. Each type of work item is also associated to a category.

field.name: NextExpectedActionDescription
field.description: Describes the action that the user receiving this type of work item is expected to take.

relation.name: Category
relation.description: The category in which this work item type is classified.

entity.name: WorkLocation
entity.description: Represent the Work Location of the latest location level

field.name: Address1
field.description: the address of the work location

field.name: Address2
field.description: The address of the work location

field.name: City
field.description: the city of the work location

field.name: Code
field.description: the code of the work location
